using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Rendering;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
    using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Controllers
{
    [Authorize(AuthenticationSchemes = "MemberScheme")]
    public class TicketsController : Controller
    {
        private readonly TicketsContext _context;

        public TicketsController(TicketsContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        // GET: Tickets
        public async Task<IActionResult> Index()
        {
            var ticketsContext = _context.Tickets.Include(t => t.Order).Include(t => t.Session).Include(t => t.TicketsArea).Include(t => t.TicketsStatus);
            return View(await ticketsContext.ToListAsync());
        }

        // GET: Tickets/Details/5
        public async Task<IActionResult> Details(string id)
        {
            if (id == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var tickets = await _context.Tickets
                .Include(t => t.Order)
                .Include(t => t.Session)
                .Include(t => t.TicketsArea)
                .Include(t => t.TicketsStatus)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(m => m.TicketsID == id);
            if (tickets == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            return View(tickets);
        }

        // GET: Tickets/Create
        public IActionResult Create()
        {
            ViewData["OrderID"] = new SelectList(_context.Order, "OrderID", "OrderID");
            ViewData["SessionID"] = new SelectList(_context.Session, "SessionID", "SessionID");
            ViewData["TicketsAreaID"] = new SelectList(_context.TicketsArea, "TicketsAreaID", "TicketsAreaID");
            ViewData["TicketsStatusID"] = new SelectList(_context.TicketsStatus, "TicketsStatusID", "TicketsStatusID");
            return View();
        }

        // POST: Tickets/Create
        // To protect from overposting attacks, enable the specific properties you want to bind to.
        // For more details, see http://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=317598.
        [HttpPost]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Create([Bind("TicketsID,RowIndex,SeatIndex,RefundTime,CreatedTime,ScannedTime,TicketsStatusID,OrderID,SessionID,TicketsAreaID")] Tickets tickets)
        {
            if (ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                _context.Add(tickets);
                await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
                return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));
            }
            ViewData["OrderID"] = new SelectList(_context.Order, "OrderID", "OrderID", tickets.OrderID);
            ViewData["SessionID"] = new SelectList(_context.Session, "SessionID", "SessionID", tickets.SessionID);
            ViewData["TicketsAreaID"] = new SelectList(_context.TicketsArea, "TicketsAreaID", "TicketsAreaID", tickets.TicketsAreaID);
            ViewData["TicketsStatusID"] = new SelectList(_context.TicketsStatus, "TicketsStatusID", "TicketsStatusID", tickets.TicketsStatusID);
            return View(tickets);
        }

        // GET: Tickets/Edit/5
        public async Task<IActionResult> Edit(string id)
        {
            if (id == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var tickets = await _context.Tickets.FindAsync(id);
            if (tickets == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }
            ViewData["OrderID"] = new SelectList(_context.Order, "OrderID", "OrderID", tickets.OrderID);
            ViewData["SessionID"] = new SelectList(_context.Session, "SessionID", "SessionID", tickets.SessionID);
            ViewData["TicketsAreaID"] = new SelectList(_context.TicketsArea, "TicketsAreaID", "TicketsAreaID", tickets.TicketsAreaID);
            ViewData["TicketsStatusID"] = new SelectList(_context.TicketsStatus, "TicketsStatusID", "TicketsStatusID", tickets.TicketsStatusID);
            return View(tickets);
        }

        // POST: Tickets/Edit/5
        // To protect from overposting attacks, enable the specific properties you want to bind to.
        // For more details, see http://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=317598.
        [HttpPost]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Edit(string id, [Bind("TicketsID,RowIndex,SeatIndex,RefundTime,CreatedTime,ScannedTime,TicketsStatusID,OrderID,SessionID,TicketsAreaID")] Tickets tickets)
        {
            if (id != tickets.TicketsID)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            if (ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                try
                {
                    _context.Update(tickets);
                    await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
                }
                catch (DbUpdateConcurrencyException)
                {
                    if (!TicketsExists(tickets.TicketsID))
                    {
                        return NotFound();
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        throw;
                    }
                }
                return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));
            }
            ViewData["OrderID"] = new SelectList(_context.Order, "OrderID", "OrderID", tickets.OrderID);
            ViewData["SessionID"] = new SelectList(_context.Session, "SessionID", "SessionID", tickets.SessionID);
            ViewData["TicketsAreaID"] = new SelectList(_context.TicketsArea, "TicketsAreaID", "TicketsAreaID", tickets.TicketsAreaID);
            ViewData["TicketsStatusID"] = new SelectList(_context.TicketsStatus, "TicketsStatusID", "TicketsStatusID", tickets.TicketsStatusID);
            return View(tickets);
        }

        // GET: Tickets/Delete/5
        public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(string id)
        {
            if (id == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var tickets = await _context.Tickets
                .Include(t => t.Order)
                .Include(t => t.Session)
                .Include(t => t.TicketsArea)
                .Include(t => t.TicketsStatus)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(m => m.TicketsID == id);
            if (tickets == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            return View(tickets);
        }

        // POST: Tickets/Delete/5
        [HttpPost, ActionName("Delete")]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> DeleteConfirmed(string id)
        {
            var tickets = await _context.Tickets.FindAsync(id);
            if (tickets != null)
            {
                _context.Tickets.Remove(tickets);
            }

            await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));
        }

        private bool TicketsExists(string id)
        {
            return _context.Tickets.Any(e => e.TicketsID == id);
        }
    }
}

using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.ID;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Controllers
{
   
    public class UserFAQsController : Controller
    {
        private readonly TicketsContext _context;

        public UserFAQsController(TicketsContext context, IIDService idService)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<IActionResult> UserIndex()
        {
            var faqs = await _context.FAQ
                .Include(f => f.FAQPublishStatus)
                .Include(f => f.FAQType)
                .Where(f => f.FAQPublishStatusID == "Y") // źu┼Ńź▄żwĄoź¼¬║ FAQ                
                .ToListAsync();
            return View(faqs);
        }


    }
}



================================================================================
FILE: \TicketSalesSystem\Controllers\UserMembersController.cs
================================================================================


using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Rendering;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.IUserAccessor;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Sms;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Member;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Controllers
{
    [Authorize(AuthenticationSchemes = "MemberScheme")]
    public class UserMembersController : Controller
    {
        private readonly TicketsContext _context;
        private readonly ISmsService _smsService;
        private readonly IUserAccessorService _userAccessorService;

        public UserMembersController(TicketsContext context, ISmsService smsService, IUserAccessorService userAccessor)
        {
            _context = context;
            _smsService = smsService;
            _userAccessorService = userAccessor;
        }

        public async Task<IActionResult> Index()
        {
            // 1. ©·▒oĘĒ½eĄnżJ¬▒«a¬║ ID
            string? memberId = _userAccessorService.GetMemberId();
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(memberId))
            {
                return RedirectToAction("MemberLogin", "Login");
            }

            // 2. ¦ņ©·Ę|Ł¹ź╗żH¬½ź¾ (ČŪĄ╣ View ĘĒ Model)
            // ?? ¬`ĘNĪG│oĖč©MżFż¦½e¬║ List<Member> ┐∙╗~ĪAźu¦ņĪuż@ŁėĪv
            var member = await _context.Member
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(m => m.MemberID == memberId);

            if (member == null) return NotFound();

            // 3. ╝ŲŠ┌▓╬Łp░Ž (ź╬®¾╗÷¬Ē¬OżĶČ¶)
            ViewBag.OrderCount = await _context.Order.CountAsync(o => o.MemberID == memberId);
            ViewBag.QuestionCount = await _context.Question.CountAsync(q => q.MemberID == memberId);
            ViewBag.MemberName = member.Name;

            // 4. ¦ņ©·│╠Ęsżķ╗x«╔ČĪ┬I
            
            //┴`┤Ż░▌╝Ų (All Quests)
            ViewBag.QuestionTotal = await _context.Question
                .CountAsync(q => q.MemberID == memberId);

            //żĄżķĘs╝W┤Ż░▌ (Today's Quests)
            var today = DateTime.Today;
            ViewBag.QuestionToday = await _context.Question
                .CountAsync(q => q.MemberID == memberId && q.CreatedTime >= today);

            //│╠Ęs┤Ż░▌«╔ČĪ
            var latestQuestion = await _context.Question
                .Where(q => q.MemberID == memberId)
                .OrderByDescending(q => q.CreatedTime)
                .Select(q => q.CreatedTime)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync();

           
            var OrderSum = await _context.Order
                .Where(q => q.MemberID == memberId)
                .CountAsync();

            //┴`Łq│µ╝Ų (All Order)
            ViewBag.OrderTotal = await _context.Order
                .CountAsync(q => q.MemberID == memberId);

            //żĄżķĘs╝WŁq│µ (Today's Order)            
            ViewBag.OrderToday = await _context.Order
                .CountAsync(q => q.MemberID == memberId && q.OrderCreatedTime >= today);
            
            //│╠ĘsŁq│µ«╔ČĪ
            var latestOrder = await _context.Order
                .Where(o => o.MemberID == memberId)
                .OrderByDescending(o => o.OrderCreatedTime)
                .Select(o => o.OrderCreatedTime)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync();

            // 5. «µ”ĪżŲ«╔ČĪ©├”sżJ ViewBag
            ViewBag.LatestQuestionTime = latestQuestion == default ? "---" : latestOrder.ToString("yyyy/MM/dd");
            ViewBag.LatestOrderTime = latestOrder == default ? "---" : latestOrder.ToString("yyyy/MM/dd");

            // 6. │B▓zĄnżJ«╔ČĪ (▒q Session ¦ņ©·»uź┐¬║ĄnżJ«╔ČĪ)
            ViewBag.LoginTime = HttpContext.Session.GetString("LoginTime")
                                ?? DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss");

            // ?? ”^ČŪ Model
            return View(member);
        }


        // GET: Members/Details/5
        public async Task<IActionResult> UserDetails(string id)
        {
            if (id == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var member = await _context.Member
                .Include(m => m.AccountStatus)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(m => m.MemberID == id);
            if (member == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var memberLogin = await _context.MemberLogin.FindAsync(id);

            ViewData["Account"] = memberLogin?.Account ?? "ĄL▒bĖ╣ĖĻ░T";

            return View(member);
        }

        [AllowAnonymous]
        // GET: Members/Create
        public IActionResult Create()
        {
            PopulateDropdownLists();
            return View();
        }

        // POST: Members/Create
        [HttpPost]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Create(VMMemberCreate vm)
        {
            //└╦¼dżŌŠ„Ė╣ĮX¼O¦_żw”s”b
            bool isTelExist = await _context.Member.AnyAsync(m => m.Tel == vm.Tel);

            if (isTelExist)
            {
                // ░w╣’ Tel ─µ”ņź[żJ┐∙╗~░T«¦
                ModelState.AddModelError("Tel", "”╣żŌŠ„Ė╣ĮXżw│Q©Žź╬ĪAĮą¦¾┤½Ė╣ĮX®╬╣┴Ėš¦õ”^▒bĖ╣ĪC");
            }

            if (!ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                PopulateDropdownLists(vm.AccountStatusID);
                return View(vm);
            }

            using (var transaction = await _context.Database.BeginTransactionAsync())
            {
                try
                {
                    string newMemberID = Guid.NewGuid().ToString();

                    var member = new Member
                    {
                        MemberID = newMemberID,
                        Name = vm.Name,
                        Address = vm.Address,
                        Birthday = vm.Birthday,
                        Tel = vm.Tel,
                        Gender = vm.Gender,
                        NationalID = vm.NationalID,
                        Email = vm.Email,
                        CreatedDate = DateTime.Now,
                        LastLoginTime = null,
                        IsPhoneVerified = false, 
                        AccountStatusID = "A"
                    };
                    _context.Member.Add(member);

                    var hasher = new Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.PasswordHasher<string>();
                    var memberLogin = new MemberLogin
                    {
                        MemberID = newMemberID,
                        Account = vm.Account,
                        Password = hasher.HashPassword(vm.Account, vm.Password)
                    };

                    _context.MemberLogin.Add(memberLogin);


                    await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
                    await transaction.CommitAsync();

                    return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));


                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    await transaction.RollbackAsync();
                    ModelState.AddModelError("", "Ęs╝WĘ|Ł¹źó▒čĪA┐∙╗~Łņ”]ĪG" + ex.Message);
                }


            }

            PopulateDropdownLists(vm.AccountStatusID);
            return View(vm);

        }

        //Ęs╝WĪGĄo░e SMS ┼ń├ęĮX
        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<IActionResult> SendSmsCode(string id)
        {
            var member = await _context.Member.FindAsync(id);
            if (member == null) return Json(new { success = false, message = "¦õżŻ©ņĘ|Ł¹ĖĻ«Ų" });

            // ź═”© 6 ”ņ╝Ų┼ń├ęĮX
            string code = new Random().Next(100000, 999999).ToString();

            // ?? ”sżJ Session (Key ź]¦t MemberID ĮT½O░▀ż@)
            HttpContext.Session.SetString($"SMS_CODE_{id}", code);
            // ¼÷┐²Ąo░e«╔ČĪĪAźiź╬®¾¦P┬_ 5 ż└─┴ż║”│«─
            HttpContext.Session.SetString($"SMS_TIME_{id}", DateTime.Now.ToString());

            // ®Iźs¦A¬║ MockSmsService (│oĘ|”L”b Debug Ą°ĄĪ)
            await _smsService.SendVerificationCodeAsync(member.Tel, code);

            return Json(new { success = true, message = "┼ń├ęĮXżwĄo░e”▄▒z¬║żŌŠ„" });
        }

        //«ų╣’┼ń├ęĮX
        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<IActionResult> SubmitVerifyCode(string id, string inputCode)
        {
            string? savedCode = HttpContext.Session.GetString($"SMS_CODE_{id}");

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(savedCode))
                return Json(new { success = false, message = "┼ń├ęĮXżw╣L┤┴ĪAĮąŁ½Ęs©·▒o" });

            if (inputCode == savedCode)
            {
                // ?? ┼ń├ę”©ź\ĪG¦¾ĘsĖĻ«Ų«w
                var member = await _context.Member.FindAsync(id);
                if (member != null)
                {
                    member.IsPhoneVerified = true;
                    await _context.SaveChangesAsync();

                    // ▓M░Ż Session
                    HttpContext.Session.Remove($"SMS_CODE_{id}");
                    return Json(new { success = true, message = "żŌŠ„╗{├ę”©ź\ĪI" });
                }
            }

            return Json(new { success = false, message = "┼ń├ęĮX┐∙╗~ĪAĮąŁ½Ęs┐ķżJ" });
        }

        // GET: Members/Edit/5
        public async Task<IActionResult> UserEdit(string id)
        {
            if (id == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var member = await _context.Member.FindAsync(id);
            if (member == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var vm = new VMMemberUserEdit
            {
                MemberID = member.MemberID,
                Name = member.Name,
                Address = member.Address,
                Birthday = member.Birthday,
                Tel = member.Tel,
                Gender = member.Gender,
                NationalID = member.NationalID,
                Email = member.Email,
                Account = (await _context.MemberLogin.FindAsync(id))?.Account,
                Password = "" // ▒KĮXżŻ└│Ėė│Q╣wČ±źRĪA½O½∙¬┼źš
            };

            return View(vm);
        }

        // POST: Members/Edit/5
        [HttpPost]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> UserEdit(string id, VMMemberUserEdit vm)
        {
            if (id != vm.MemberID) return NotFound();

            //└╦¼dżŌŠ„Ė╣ĮX¼O¦_żw”s”b
            bool isTelExist = await _context.Member.AnyAsync(m => m.Tel == vm.Tel);

            if (isTelExist)
            {
                // ░w╣’ Tel ─µ”ņź[żJ┐∙╗~░T«¦
                ModelState.AddModelError("Tel", "”╣żŌŠ„Ė╣ĮXżw│Q©Žź╬ĪAĮą¦¾┤½Ė╣ĮX®╬╣┴Ėš¦õ”^▒bĖ╣ĪC");
            }

            ModelState.Remove("NationalID");
            ModelState.Remove("Account");
            ModelState.Remove("Password");

            if (!ModelState.IsValid) return View(vm);


            var member = await _context.Member.FindAsync(vm.MemberID);
            if (member == null) return NotFound();


            try
            {
                //│B▓zżŌŠ„Ė╣ĮX┼▄¦¾┼▐┐Ķ (”p¬GżŌŠ„┤½żFĪA½ž─│Ł½│]┼ń├ę¬¼║A)
                if (member.Tel != vm.Tel)
                {
                    member.IsPhoneVerified = false;
                }

                member.Address = vm.Address;
                member.Tel = vm.Tel;
                member.Email = vm.Email;

                await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
                TempData["Success"] = "ŁėżHĖĻ«Ųżw¦¾Ęs";
                return RedirectToAction("UserEdit", new { id = vm.MemberID });
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ModelState.AddModelError("", "Ę|Ł¹ĖĻ«Ų¦¾Ęsźó▒čĪA┐∙╗~Łņ”]ĪG" + ex.Message);
            }

            return View(vm);
        }

        private void PopulateDropdownLists(string? selectedStatus = null)
        {

            ViewData["AccountStatusID"] = new SelectList(_context.AccountStatus.ToList(), "AccountStatusID", "FullDisplayName", selectedStatus);

        }

    }
}



================================================================================
FILE: \TicketSalesSystem\Controllers\UserOrdersController.cs
================================================================================


using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.IUserAccessor;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Queue;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Booking;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel.Order;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Controllers
{
    [Authorize(AuthenticationSchemes = "MemberScheme")]
    public class UserOrdersController : Controller
    {
        private readonly TicketsContext _context;
        private readonly IQueueService _queueService;
        private readonly IUserAccessorService _userAccessorService;
        public UserOrdersController(TicketsContext context, IQueueService queueService, IUserAccessorService userAccessorService)
        {
            _context = context;
            _queueService = queueService;
            _userAccessorService = userAccessorService;
        }

        // ½eźxĘ|Ł¹▒M░Ž¬║Łq│µ”C¬Ē
        public async Task<IActionResult> UserIndex()
        {
            var memberID = _userAccessorService.GetMemberId();

            if (memberID == null)
            {
                return RedirectToAction("MemberLogin", "Login");
            }

            var time = (int)Math.Max(0, (DateTime.Now.AddMinutes(10) - DateTime.Now).TotalSeconds);

            var odrders = await _context.Order
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Include(o => o.OrderStatus)
                .Include(o => o.Session).ThenInclude(s => s.Programme).ThenInclude(s => s.Place)
                .Include(o => o.Tickets).ThenInclude(t => t.TicketsArea)
                .Where(o => o.MemberID == memberID)
                .OrderByDescending(o => o.OrderCreatedTime)
                .Select(o => new VMBookingDetailsResponse
                {
                    OrderID = o.OrderID,
                    ProgrammeName = o.Session.Programme.ProgrammeName,
                    StartTime = o.Session.StartTime.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"),
                    PlaceName = o.Session.Programme.Place.PlaceName,
                    FinalAmount = o.Tickets.Sum(t => t.TicketsArea.Price),
                    OrderStatusID = o.OrderStatusID,
                    OrderStatusName = o.OrderStatus.OrderStatusName,
                    Seats = o.Tickets.Select(t => $"{t.RowIndex}▒Ų{t.SeatIndex}Ė╣").ToList(),
                    //źu”│”b¬¼║A¼O½▌źI┤┌ (P) «╔ż~╗▌ŁnŁp║ŌĪAżw¦╣”© (Y) ¬║Ė▄┤NĄ╣ 0
                    RemainingSeconds = o.OrderStatusID == "P" ? time : 0,
                    Success = o.OrderStatusID == "Y",
                    Message = o.OrderStatusID == "Y" ? "źI┤┌¦╣”©" : o.OrderStatusID == "N" ? "Łq│µźó«─" : "½▌źI┤┌",
                    TicketDetails = o.Tickets.Select(t => new VMTicketDetail
                    {
                        SeatInfo = $"{t.TicketsArea.TicketsAreaName} {t.RowIndex}▒Ų {t.SeatIndex}Ė╣",
                        StatusName = t.TicketsStatus.TicketsStatusName ?? "ź╝¬Š",
                        Price = t.TicketsArea.Price
                    }).ToList()
                })
                .ToArrayAsync();


            if (odrders == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            return View(odrders);
        }

        // ½eźxĘ|Ł¹▒M░Ž¬║Łq│µĖį▓ėĖĻ«Ų
        public async Task<IActionResult> UserDetail(string id)
        {
            if (id == null) return BadRequest();
            var order = await _context.Order
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Include(o => o.OrderStatus)
                .Include(o => o.Session).ThenInclude(s => s.Programme).ThenInclude(s => s.Place)
                .Include(o => o.Tickets).ThenInclude(t => t.TicketsArea)
                .Include(o => o.Tickets).ThenInclude(t => t.Session)
                .Include(o => o.Tickets).ThenInclude(t => t.TicketsStatus)
                .Where(o => o.OrderID == id)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync();
            if (order == null) return NotFound();

            var isPrintable = true;

            //¦P┬_żč╝Ų
            //DateTime.Now >= order.Session.StartTime.AddDays(-15);

            var vm = new VMUserOrderDetail
            {
                OrderID = order.OrderID,
                ProgrammeName = order.Session.Programme.ProgrammeName,
                StartTime = order.Session.StartTime.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"),
                PlaceName = order.Session.Programme.Place.PlaceName,
                FinalAmount = order.Tickets.Sum(t => t.TicketsArea.Price),
                OrderStatusName = order.OrderStatus.OrderStatusName,
                Seats = order.Tickets.Select(t => $"{t.RowIndex}▒Ų{t.SeatIndex}Ė╣").ToList(),
                IsPrintable = isPrintable,
                Tickets = order.Tickets.Select(t => new VMUserTicketItem
                {
                    OrderID = order.OrderID,
                    ProgrammeName = order.Session.Programme.ProgrammeName,
                    StartTime = order.Session.StartTime.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"),
                    PlaceName = order.Session.Programme.Place.PlaceName,
                    FinalAmount = t.TicketsArea.Price,
                    TicketsID = t.TicketsID,
                    TicketsAreaName = t.TicketsArea.TicketsAreaName,
                    Seat = $"{t.RowIndex}▒Ų{t.SeatIndex}Ė╣",
                    CheckInCode = t.CheckInCode /*isPrintable? t.CheckInCode: null*/
                }).ToList()
            };

            return View(vm);
        }



        // ½eźxĘ|Ł¹▒M░ŽĪG©Žź╬¬╠źD░╩©·«°Łq│µ (źu»Ó©·«°Īu½▌źI┤┌Īv¬║Łq│µ)
        [HttpPost]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> UserCancelOrder(string id)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(id)) return BadRequest("Łq│µĮsĖ╣żŻźi¼░¬┼");

            // 1. ©·▒oĘĒ½eĄnżJ¬║Ę|Ł¹ ID (░▓│]¦A”s”b Session ®╬ Claims żż)
            var memberID = _userAccessorService.GetMemberId();

            if (memberID == null)
            {
                return RedirectToAction("MemberLogin", "Login");
            }



            // 2. ¦ņ©·Łq│µĪA©├ĮT½OĖėŁq│µ─▌®¾”╣Ę|Ł¹ĪAźB│B®¾Īu½▌źI┤┌Īv¬¼║A
            // ░▓│] 'P' źN¬Ē½▌źI┤┌ (Pending Payment)
            var order = await _context.Order
                .Include(o => o.Tickets)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(o => o.OrderID == id && o.MemberID == memberID);

            if (order == null) return NotFound();

            // ?? ”wź■└╦¼dĪGźu”│¬¼║A¼░½▌źI┤┌«╔ż~»Óźč©Žź╬¬╠źD░╩©·«°
            if (order.OrderStatusID != "P")
            {
                TempData["Error"] = "Łq│µ¬¼║Ażw┼▄¦¾ĪAĄL¬kżŌ░╩©·«°ĪC";
                return RedirectToAction("Details", new { id = order.OrderID });
            }

            using var transaction = await _context.Database.BeginTransactionAsync();
            try
            {
                // 3. ░§”µ©·«°░╩¦@
                order.OrderStatusID = "C"; // ¦’¼░©·«°¬¼║A

                // 4. │s░╩¦¾Ęs▓╝©ķ¬¼║A¼░ 'C' (│oĘ|─▓Ąo¦A¬║ SQL Trigger ”█░╩”^Ė╔«w”s)
                await _context.Tickets
                     .Where(t => t.OrderID == id)
                     .ExecuteUpdateAsync(s => s.SetProperty(t => t.TicketsStatusID, "C"));

                await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
                await transaction.CommitAsync();
                _queueService.ReleaseQueueSlot();
                TempData["Success"] = "Łq│µżw”©ź\©·«°ĪA”W├Bżw─└źXĪC";
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync();
                TempData["Error"] = "©·«°źó▒čĪAĮąĄy½ß”AĖšĪC";
            }

            return RedirectToAction("UserIndex"); // ¬­”^Ę|Ł¹¬║Łq│µ”C¬Ē
        }

    }
}

using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.IUserAccessor;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Controllers
{
    
    public class UserPublicNoticesController : Controller
    {
        private readonly TicketsContext _context;
        
        public UserPublicNoticesController(TicketsContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
            
        }

        public IActionResult UserIndex()
        {
            var publicNotices = _context.PublicNotice
                .Where(p => p.PublicNoticeStatus == true)
                .ToList();
            return View(publicNotices);
        }

        public async Task<IActionResult> UserDetails(string id)
        {
            if (id == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            var publicNotices = await _context.PublicNotice
               .Where(p => p.PublicNoticeStatus == true)
               .FirstOrDefaultAsync(m => m.PublicNoticeID == id);

            if (publicNotices == null)
            {
                return NotFound();
            }

            return View(publicNotices);
        }

    }
}



================================================================================
FILE: \TicketSalesSystem\Controllers\UserQuestionsController.cs
================================================================================


using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Rendering;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.Images;
using TicketSalesSystem.Service.IUserAccessor;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Controllers
{
    [Authorize(AuthenticationSchemes = "MemberScheme")]
    public class UserQuestionsController : Controller
    {
        private readonly TicketsContext _context;
        private readonly IFileService _fileService;
        private readonly IUserAccessorService _userAccessorService;

        public UserQuestionsController(TicketsContext context, IFileService fileService, IUserAccessorService userAccessor)
        {
            _context = context;
            _fileService = fileService;
            _userAccessorService = userAccessor;
        }

        // A. ¦┌¬║┤Ż░▌¼÷┐² («°ČO¬╠źu»Ó¼▌”█żv¬║)
        public async Task<IActionResult> MyList()
        {
            //// ?? │oĖ╠╝╚«╔╝g”║ĪAż¦½ßŁn▒q User.Identity ®╬ Session ¦ņ MemberID
            //string currentMemberId = "004bc90a-26fb-48e9-a762-653a232d86e2";
            var memberID = _userAccessorService.GetMemberId();

            if (memberID == null)
            {
                return RedirectToAction("MemberLogin", "Login");
            }

            var myQuestions = await _context.Question
                .Include(q => q.QuestionType)
                .Include(q => q.Reply) // Ė³żJ”^┬ą¼÷┐²
                .Where(q => q.MemberID == memberID)
                .OrderByDescending(q => q.CreatedTime)
                .ToListAsync();

            return View(myQuestions);
        }
        public async Task<IActionResult> Create()
        {
            PopulateDropdownLists();
            return View();
        }

        // B. ┤ŻźµĘs░▌├D (POST)
        [HttpPost]
        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]
        public async Task<IActionResult> Create(Question question, IFormFile? upload)
        {
            var memberID = _userAccessorService.GetMemberId();

            if (memberID == null)
            {
                return RedirectToAction("MemberLogin", "Login");
            }

            // ?? ½ß║▌Ė╔©¼ź▓ŁnĖĻ░T
            question.QuestionID = Guid.NewGuid().ToString();
            question.CreatedTime = DateTime.Now;
            question.MemberID = memberID; // └│¦ņ©·ĄnżJ¬╠


            // ”p¬G©S”│żWČŪ└╔«ūĪAĮT½O UploadFile ─µ”ņ¼░ null
            if (upload != null && upload.Length != 0)
            {
                string dbPath = await _fileService.SaveFileAsync(upload, "Questions");
                question.UploadFile = dbPath;
            }



            // ▓Š░ŻżŻ╗▌Łn½e║▌┐ķżJ¬║┼ń├ę
            ModelState.Remove("QuestionID");
            ModelState.Remove("MemberID");
            ModelState.Remove("CreatedTime");


            if (ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                _context.Add(question);
                await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
                return RedirectToAction(nameof(MyList));
            }


            PopulateDropdownLists(question);

            return View(question);

        }

        // GET: Questions/Details/5
        public async Task<IActionResult> UserDetails(string id)
        {
            if (id == null) return NotFound();

            var memberID = _userAccessorService.GetMemberId();

            if (memberID == null)
            {
                return RedirectToAction("MemberLogin", "Login");
            }

            var question = await _context.Question
                .Include(q => q.QuestionType)
                .Include(q => q.Member)
                .Include(q => q.Reply
                    .Where(r => r.EmployeeID != null)
                    .OrderBy(r => r.CreatedTime)) // ½÷«╔ČĪČČ¦Ū▒Ų”C”^┬ą
                        .ThenInclude(r => r.Employee) // Ė³żJ¼OŁ■”ņŁ¹żu”^┬ą¬║
                .Include(q => q.Reply)
                    .ThenInclude(r => r.ReplyStatus) // Ė³żJ”^┬ą¬¼║A”W║┘
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(m => m.QuestionID == id);

            if (question == null) return NotFound();

            // ?? «ųż▀”wź■└╦¼dĪG©ŠżŅ¬▒«a│z╣LŁū¦’ URL ░Į¼▌¦OżH¬║░▌├D
            if (question.MemberID != memberID)
            {
                return Forbid(); // ČŪ░eźó▒čĪG┼vŁŁżŻ©¼
            }

            ViewData["ReplyStatusID"] = new SelectList(_context.ReplyStatus.ToList(), "ReplyStatusID", "ReplyStatusName");
            return View(question);
        }

        private void PopulateDropdownLists(Question q = null)
        {
            ViewData["QuestionTypeID"] = new SelectList(_context.QuestionType.ToList(), "QuestionTypeID", "QuestionTypeName", q?.QuestionTypeID);
        }

    }
}

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Helpers
{
    public class FileHelper
    {
        // ╗▓¦UżĶ¬kĪG└╦¼d└╔«ū¼O¦_¼░╣Žż∙«µ”Ī
        public static bool IsImage(string extension)
        {
            // ®wĖq▒`©Ż¬║╣Žż∙░Ų└╔”W▓M│µĪ]┬Óżp╝gż±Ė¹ĪA┴ū¦Kżjżp╝gżŻż@ŁPĪ^
            string[] imgExtensions = { ".jpg", ".jpeg", ".png", ".gif", ".webp", ".bmp", ".svg" };

            return imgExtensions.Contains(extension.ToLower());
        }
    }
}



================================================================================
FILE: \TicketSalesSystem\Helpers\SeatHelper.cs
================================================================================


using Azure.Core;
using TicketSalesSystem.Models;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Helpers
{

   
    public static class SeatHelper
    {
        static string ticketStatusCode = "N";

        //▓Żź═«y”ņ¬Ē
        public static List<VMSeats> GenerateSeatLayout(int rowCount, int seatCount, List<Tickets> soldTickets,string ticketsAreaStatus)
        {
            //┐z┐’źX”│«─¬║żw░Ō▓╝©ķ (żw░ŌźX®╬”¹”ņżżĪA®╬¼O10ż└─┴ż║ŁĶ½žź▀¬║)
            var activeTickets = soldTickets
                .Where(t => t.TicketsStatusID == "S" || t.TicketsStatusID == "P" || t.CreatedTime.AddMinutes(10) > DateTime.Now)
                .ToList();


            //var soldSet = new HashSet<string>(
            //    soldTickets.Select(t => $"{t.RowIndex}-{t.SeatIndex}")
            //    );
            //ĘŪ│Ų”nĪu”│żH¦żĪv¬║”W│µĪA”╣¼q¦┌ĖšĄ█ź[ĪA”²źó▒čż]©S├÷½Y
            var soldDict = new Dictionary<string, string>();
            foreach (var t in activeTickets)
            {
                string key = $"{t.RowIndex}-{t.SeatIndex}";
                if (!soldDict.ContainsKey(key))
                {
                    soldDict.Add(key, t.TicketsStatusID);
                }
            }

            var seatList = new List<VMSeats>();

            //Č}®lĄe®ę”│¬║”ņżl (rowCount * seatCount)
            for (int r = 1; r <= rowCount; r++)
            {
                for (int s = 1; s <= seatCount; s++)
                {
                    var seatid = $"{r}-{s}";
                    var label = $"{r}▒Ų{s}Ė╣";

                    //ż±╣’”W│µĪA©M®wĖė«µ«y”ņ¬║¬¼║A
                    string statusText = "źi░Ō";                    
                    if (soldDict.TryGetValue(seatid, out string statusId))//out string statusId╣┴Ėš¦ņ©·Ł╚ĪA”p¬G¦ņ©ņżF┤NČČ½K¦Ōź””sČi│oŁė┼▄╝ŲĖ╠
                    {
                        var ticketStatusCode = statusId;
                        statusText = (ticketStatusCode == "S") ? "żw░Ō" : "½O»dżż";
                    }

                    seatList.Add(new VMSeats
                    {
                        SeatID = seatid,
                        RowIndex = r,
                        SeatIndex = s,
                        Label = label,
                        Status = ticketStatusCode,
                    });
                }
            }
            return seatList;
        }


        // ”█░╩░t”ņ║t║Ō¬kĪG┤M¦õ│s─“«y”ņ
        public static List<string> FindBestSeats(List<VMSeats> allSeats, int count)
        {

            var rowGroups = allSeats
                .Where(s => s.Status == ticketStatusCode)
                .GroupBy(s => s.RowIndex)
                .OrderBy(g => g.Key);// ©╠Ęė▒Ų╝Ų▒Ų¦Ū

            foreach (var row in rowGroups)
            {
                var seatsInRow = row.OrderBy(s => s.SeatIndex).ToList();
                if (seatsInRow.Count < count)
                {
                    continue; // ”p¬GĖė▒Ųźi░Ō«y”ņ╝ŲČqżŻ©¼ĪAĖ§╣L
                }

                for (int i = 0; i <= seatsInRow.Count - count; i++)
                {
                    var potential = seatsInRow.GetRange(i, count);
                    // «ųż▀Łū¦’ĪG─Y«µ└╦¼d SeatIndex ¼O¦_│s─“
                    // ©ŠżŅ©ę”p [1, 2, 5] │o║ž┴÷ĄM”│ 3 ▒i”²żżČĪ┬_▒╝¬║▒Ī¬p
                    bool isContinuous = true;
                    // └╦¼d¼O¦_»u¬║│s─“Ī]¦ŪĖ╣«tŁ╚└╦¼dĪ^
                    for (int j = 0; j < potential.Count - 1; j++)
                    {
                        if (potential[j + 1].SeatIndex - potential[j].SeatIndex != 1)
                        {
                            isContinuous = false;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if (isContinuous)
                    {
                        return potential.Select(s => s.SeatID).ToList();
                    }
                }
            }
            return new List<string>(); // ¦õżŻ©ņ½h”^ČŪ¬┼▓M│µ

        }

       

        

    }
}



================================================================================
FILE: \TicketSalesSystem\Helpers\SessionHelper.cs
================================================================================


using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using System.Text.Json;

// JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<IEnumerable<PetFoodData>>(response);//▒NJSONĖĻ«ŲżŽ¦Ū”CżŲ¼░List<PetFoodData>¬½ź¾Č░”X└│Ėė¦’”©│oŁė
namespace TicketSalesSystem.Helpers
{
    public static class SessionHelper
    {
        //JsonSerializerOptions ź╬®¾¦Ū”CżŲ®MżŽ¦Ū”CżŲ Session żż¬║¬½ź¾ĪAź╬©ė▒▒©Ņ JSON Łn½ń╗“┬ÓĪB½ń╗“┼¬
        private static readonly JsonSerializerOptions options = new JsonSerializerOptions
        {
            //Īużjżp╝gżŻ▒ėĘPĪv
            PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = true,

             // ”p¬G¦A¬║ĖĻ«Ų”│╝h»┼├÷½YĪA│o»Ó┴ū¦K¼Y©Ū¦Ū”CżŲ░▌├D
            ReferenceHandler = System.Text.Json.Serialization.ReferenceHandler.IgnoreCycles
        };

        //©Žź╬®wĖq”n¬║ Options Či”µ¦Ū”CżŲ(ISession:ĪAT:¬x½¼ (Generics))
        public static void SetObject<T>(this ISession session, string key, T value)
        {
            
            session.SetString(key, JsonSerializer.Serialize(value, options));
        }

        //▒N¬½ź¾┬Ó”© JSON ”r”ĻĪAĄM½ß”s©ņ Session żż
        public static T GetObject<T>(this ISession session, string key)
        {
            var value = session.GetString(key);
            // ©Žź╬®wĖq”n¬║ Options Či”µżŽ¦Ū”CżŲ
            return value == null ? default : JsonSerializer.Deserialize<T>(value, options);
        }

    }
}



================================================================================
FILE: \TicketSalesSystem\Helpers\StringHelper.cs
================================================================================


namespace TicketSalesSystem.Helpers
{
    public class StringHelper
    {
        // ©Žź╬ GUID ▓Żź═½³®w¬°½ū¬║«ųŠPĮX

        public static string GenerateCheckInCode(int length=12)
        {
            // ▓Żź═ż@ŁėĘs¬║ GUIDĪA©├▓Š░Ż│s”rĖ╣
            string guidString = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N"); // "N" «µ”ĪĘ|▓Š░Ż│s”rĖ╣
            // ”p¬G½³®w¬║¬°½ūżj®¾ GUID ”r”Ļ¬║¬°½ūĪA½h”^ČŪŠŃŁė GUID ”r”Ļ
            if (length >= guidString.Length)
            {
                return guidString;
            }
            // ¦_½hĪA”^ČŪ½³®w¬°½ū¬║żl”r”Ļ

            return guidString.Substring(0, length).ToUpper(); 
        }
    }
}

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class AccountStatus
    {
        [Key]
        [Column(TypeName = "nchar(1)")]
        public string AccountStatusID { get; set; }= null!;

        [Display(Name = "▒bĖ╣¬¼║A”W║┘")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [StringLength(10, ErrorMessage = "▒bĖ╣¬¼║A”W║┘│╠”h10Łė”r")]
        public string AccountStatusName { get; set; }= null!;



        //├÷┴p
        public List<Member>? Member { get; set; }
        public List<Employee>? Employee { get; set; }


        //┼Ńź▄ź╬
        [NotMapped]
        public string FullDisplayName => $"{AccountStatusID} - {AccountStatusName}";
    }

}

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class EmployeeLogin
    {
        [Key]
        [Display(Name = "▒bĖ╣")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [StringLength(30, MinimumLength = 8, ErrorMessage = "▒bĖ╣¬°½ū╗▌żČ®¾ 8 ©ņ 30 Łė”rżĖ")]
        [RegularExpression("[a-zA-Z0-9]*$", ErrorMessage = "▒bĖ╣źu»Óź]¦tŁ^żÕ”rź└ĪB╝Ų”r")]        
        public string Account { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "▒KĮX")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.Password)]
        [StringLength(200, MinimumLength = 8, ErrorMessage = "▒KĮX¬°½ū”▄żų╗▌ 8 ”ņ")]
        [RegularExpression(@"^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d)[a-zA-Z\d]{8,}$",
         ErrorMessage = "▒KĮXź▓ČĘź]¦t”▄żųż@Łėżj╝g”rź└ĪBż@Łėżp╝g”rź└╗Pż@Łė╝Ų”rĪAźB¬°½ū”▄żų 8 ĮX")]

        public string Password { get; set; } = null!;








        //FK░Ž░ņ
        [Key]
        [ForeignKey("Member")]
        public string EmployeeID { get; set; } = null!;

        //├÷┴p
        public virtual Employee? Employee { get; set; }
    }
}

using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class FAQ
    {
        [Key]
        [StringLength(36, MinimumLength = 36)]
        [HiddenInput]
        public string FAQID { get; set; } = null!;


        [Display(Name = "▒`©Ż░▌├D")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [StringLength(50, ErrorMessage = "╝ą├D│╠”h50Łė”r")]
        public string FAQTitle { get; set; } = null!;


        [Display(Name = "▒`©Ż░▌├D╗Ī®·")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.MultilineText)]
        public string FAQDescription { get; set; } = null!;





        //FK░Ž
        [Display(Name = "Łt│dżHŁ¹")]
        public string EmployeeID { get; set; } = null!;
        [Display(Name = "Ąo¦G¬¼║A")]
        public string FAQPublishStatusID { get; set; } = null!;
        [Display(Name = "▒`©Ż░▌├D║ž├■")]
        public string FAQTypeID { get; set; } = null!;

        //├÷┴p░Ž
        public virtual FAQPublishStatus? FAQPublishStatus { get; set; }
        public virtual Employee? Employee { get; set; }
        public virtual FAQType? FAQType { get; set; }
    }
}

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class MemberLogin
    {
        [Key]
        [Display(Name = "▒bĖ╣")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]        
        [StringLength(30, MinimumLength = 8, ErrorMessage = "▒bĖ╣¬°½ū╗▌żČ®¾ 8 ©ņ 30 Łė”rżĖ")]
        [RegularExpression("[a-zA-Z0-9]*$", ErrorMessage = "▒bĖ╣źu»Óź]¦tŁ^żÕ”rź└ĪB╝Ų”r")]
        public string Account { get; set; }=null!;

        [Display(Name = "▒KĮX")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.Password)]
        [StringLength(200, MinimumLength = 8, ErrorMessage = "▒KĮX¬°½ū”▄żų╗▌ 8 ”ņ")]

        [RegularExpression(@"^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d)[a-zA-Z\d]{8,}$",
         ErrorMessage = "▒KĮXź▓ČĘź]¦t”▄żųż@Łėżj╝g”rź└ĪBż@Łėżp╝g”rź└╗Pż@Łė╝Ų”rĪAźB¬°½ū”▄żų 8 ĮX")]
        public string Password { get; set; } = null!;


        //FK
        [Key]
        [ForeignKey("Member")]
        public string MemberID { get; set; } = null!;


        //├÷┴p
        public Member? Member { get; set; }

    }
}

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.Diagnostics;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class Order
    {
        [Key]
        [StringLength(14,MinimumLength =14)]
        public string OrderID { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "Łq│µ½žź▀«╔ČĪ")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        [DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:yyyy”~MMżļddżķ hh:mm:ss}")]
        public DateTime OrderCreatedTime { get; set; }= DateTime.Now;
              

        [StringLength(36, MinimumLength = 36)]
        public string? PaymentTradeNO { get; set; }//▒─ź╬GUID     

        [Display(Name = "¬„¼yż║«e")]
        [StringLength(100, ErrorMessage = "│╠”h100Łė”r")]
        public string? PaymentDescription { get; set; }

        [Display(Name = "¬„¼y¬¼║A")]             
        public bool PaymentStatus { get; set; }= false;//falseź╝źI┤┌ trueżwźI┤┌

        //[Display(Name = "Łq│µ½O»d«╔ČĪ")]
        //[Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        //[DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        //[DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:HH:mm}")]
        //public DateTime ExpireAt { get; set; }

        [Display(Name = "źI┤┌¦╣”©«╔ČĪ")]
        [DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        [DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:yyyy”~MMżļddżķ hh:mm:ss}")]
        public DateTime? PaidTime { get; set; }



        //FK░Ž
        public  string MemberID { get; set; } = null!;       
        public  string PaymentMethodID { get; set; } = null!;        
        public string OrderStatusID { get; set; } = null!;     
        public string SessionID { get; set; } = null!;


        
        




        //├÷┴p░Ž

        public virtual Member? Member { get; set; }
        public virtual PaymentMethod? PaymentMethod { get; set; }
        public virtual OrderStatus? OrderStatus { get; set; }
        public virtual Session? Session { get; set; }

        public virtual List<Question>? Question { get; set; }

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class Programme
    {
        [Key]
        [Column(TypeName = "nchar(8)")]
        [DatabaseGenerated(DatabaseGeneratedOption.None)] // ¦iČD EFĪGID ¼Oźč SQL ©ń╝Ų║Ō”nČŪČi©ė¬║”r”Ļ
        public string ProgrammeID { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "¼Ī░╩”W║┘")]        
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [StringLength(50, ErrorMessage = "¼Ī░╩”W║┘│╠”h50Łė”r")]
        public string ProgrammeName { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "¼Ī░╩ż║«e")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.MultilineText)]
        public string ProgrammeDescription { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "¬`ĘN©ŲČĄ")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.MultilineText)]
        public string Notice { get; set; } = null!;

        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.MultilineText)]
        public string PurchaseReminder { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "©·▓╝┤Ż┐¶")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.MultilineText)]
        public string CollectionReminder { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "░h▓╝╗Ī®·")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.MultilineText)]
        public string RefundPolicy { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "½žź▀«╔ČĪ")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        [DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:yyyy/MM/dd hh:mm:ss}")]

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class Question
    {
        [Key]
        [StringLength(36, MinimumLength = 36)]
        public string QuestionID { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "░▌├D╝ą├D")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [StringLength(100, MinimumLength = 2, ErrorMessage = "╝ą├D│╠”h100Łė”r")]
        public string QuestionTitle { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "░▌├Dż║«e")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.MultilineText)]
        public string QuestionDescription { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "┤Ż░▌«╔ČĪ")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        [DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:yyyy”~MMżļddżķ hh:mm:ss}")]
        public DateTime CreatedTime { get; set; } = DateTime.Now;

        [Display(Name = "żWČŪ└╔«ū")]
        [StringLength(40, MinimumLength = 40)]
        public string? UploadFile { get; set; } = null!;



        //FK░Ž
        public string MemberID { get; set; } = null!;
        public string QuestionTypeID { get; set; } = null!;

        [StringLength(14, MinimumLength = 14)]
        public string? OrderID { get; set; } 


        //├÷┴p░Ž
        public virtual Member? Member { get; set; } 
        public virtual QuestionType? QuestionType { get; set; }

        [ForeignKey(nameof(OrderID))]
        public virtual Order? Order { get; set; }


        public virtual List<Reply>? Reply { get; set; }





    }
}

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class Role
    {
        [Key]
        [StringLength(1)]
        public string RoleID { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "┬Š”ņ”W║┘")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [StringLength(20, MinimumLength = 2, ErrorMessage = "┬Š”ņ”W║┘2~20Łė”r")]
        public string RoleName { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "┬Š”ņ╗Ī®·")]
        [DataType(DataType.MultilineText)]
        public string? RoleDescription { get; set; }




        //├÷┴p░Ž
        public virtual List<Employee>? Employee { get; set; }



        //┼Ńź▄ź╬
        [NotMapped]
        public string FullDisplayName => $"{RoleID} - {RoleName}";
    }
}

using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using System;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class SeedData
    {
        public static void Initialize(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            using (TicketsContext context = new TicketsContext(serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<DbContextOptions<TicketsContext>>()))
            {
                //©ż”Ō

                if (!context.Role.Any())
                {
                    context.Role.AddRange(
                    new Role
                    {
                        RoleID = "A",
                        RoleName = "©t▓╬║▐▓zŁ¹",
                        RoleDescription = ""
                    },
                    new Role
                    {
                        RoleID = "B",
                        RoleName = "¼Ī░╩║▐▓zŁ¹",
                        RoleDescription = ""
                    },
                    new Role
                    {
                        RoleID = "C",
                        RoleName = "½╚¬AżHŁ¹",
                        RoleDescription = ""
                    }
                    );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }

                //▒bĖ╣¬¼║A
                if (!context.AccountStatus.Any())
                {
                    context.AccountStatus.AddRange(
                     new AccountStatus
                     {
                         AccountStatusID = "A",
                         AccountStatusName = "ź┐▒`"
                     },
                     new AccountStatus
                     {
                         AccountStatusID = "B",
                         AccountStatusName = "░▒┼v"
                     }
                    );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }

                //¼Ī░╩¬¼║A
                if (!context.ProgrammeStatus.Any())
                {
                    context.ProgrammeStatus.AddRange(
                    new ProgrammeStatus
                    {
                        ProgrammeStatusID = "D",
                        ProgrammeStatusName = "»¾ĮZ"
                    },
                    new ProgrammeStatus
                    {
                        ProgrammeStatusID = "R",
                        ProgrammeStatusName = "│]®w¦╣”©"
                    },
                    new ProgrammeStatus
                    {
                        ProgrammeStatusID = "O",
                        ProgrammeStatusName = "Č}Įµżż"
                    },
                    new ProgrammeStatus
                    {
                        ProgrammeStatusID = "S",
                        ProgrammeStatusName = "żw¦╣░Ō"
                    },
                    new ProgrammeStatus
                    {
                        ProgrammeStatusID = "E",
                        ProgrammeStatusName = "żwĄ▓¦¶"
                    },
                    new ProgrammeStatus
                    {
                        ProgrammeStatusID = "C",
                        ProgrammeStatusName = "żw©·«°"
                    },
                    new ProgrammeStatus
                    {
                        ProgrammeStatusID = "H",
                        ProgrammeStatusName = "żwżU¼["
                    }
                    );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }
                //░▌├D║ž├■
                if (!context.QuestionType.Any())
                {
                    context.QuestionType.AddRange(
                    new QuestionType
                    {
                        QuestionTypeID = "Q1",
                        QuestionTypeName = "Łq│µ░▌├D"
                    },
                    new QuestionType
                    {
                        QuestionTypeID = "Q2",
                        QuestionTypeName = "źI┤┌░▌├D"
                    },
                    new QuestionType
                    {
                        QuestionTypeID = "Q3",
                        QuestionTypeName = "▓╝©ķ░▌├D"
                    }

                    );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }
                //”^┬ą¬¼║A
                if (!context.ReplyStatus.Any())
                {
                    context.ReplyStatus.AddRange(
                    new ReplyStatus
                    {
                        ReplyStatusID = "N",
                        ReplyStatusName = "ź╝”^┬ą"
                    },
                    new ReplyStatus
                    {
                        ReplyStatusID = "Y",
                        ReplyStatusName = "żw”^┬ą"
                    }
                    );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }
                //FAQ║ž├■
                if (!context.FAQType.Any())
                {
                    context.FAQType.AddRange(
                    new FAQType
                    {
                        FAQTypeID = "F1",
                        FAQTypeName = "Łq▓╝¼yĄ{"
                    },
                    new FAQType
                    {
                        FAQTypeID = "F2",
                        FAQTypeName = "źI┤┌░▌├D"
                    },
                    new FAQType
                    {
                        FAQTypeID = "F3",
                        FAQTypeName = "▒bĖ╣¼█├÷"
                    }
                    );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }
                //FAQĄo¦G¬¼║A
                if (!context.FAQPublishStatus.Any())
                {
                    context.FAQPublishStatus.AddRange(
                    new FAQPublishStatus
                    {
                        FAQPublishStatusID = "N",
                        FAQPublishStatusName = "ź╝Ąo¦G"
                    },
                    new FAQPublishStatus
                    {
                        FAQPublishStatusID = "Y",
                        FAQPublishStatusName = "żwĄo¦G"
                    }
                    );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }
                //Łq│µ¬¼║A
                if (!context.OrderStatus.Any())
                {
                    context.OrderStatus.AddRange(
                    new OrderStatus
                    {
                        OrderStatusID = "N",
                        OrderStatusName = "╣O┤┴źI┤┌"
                    },
                    new OrderStatus
                    {
                        OrderStatusID = "Y",
                        OrderStatusName = "żwźI┤┌"
                    },
                    new OrderStatus
                    {
                        OrderStatusID = "P",
                        OrderStatusName = "½▌źI┤┌"
                    }
                );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }
                //źI┤┌żĶ”Ī
                if (!context.PaymentMethod.Any())
                {
                    context.PaymentMethod.AddRange(
                    new PaymentMethod
                    {
                        PaymentMethodID = "C",
                        PaymentMethodName = "½Hź╬źd"
                    },
                    new PaymentMethod
                    {
                        PaymentMethodID = "A",
                        PaymentMethodName = "ATM ┬Ó▒b"
                    }
                    );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }
                
                //▓╝©ķ¬¼║A
                if (!context.TicketsStatus.Any())
                {
                    context.TicketsStatus.AddRange(
                     new TicketsStatus
                     {
                         TicketsStatusID = "C",
                         TicketsStatusName = "©·«°"
                     },
                     new TicketsStatus
                     {
                         TicketsStatusID = "N",
                         TicketsStatusName = "źi░Ō"
                     },
                     new TicketsStatus

                        SaleStartTime = new DateTime(2026, 12, 3, 12, 0, 0),
                        SaleEndTime = new DateTime(2027, 1, 11, 23, 59, 59),
                        StartTime = new DateTime(2027, 1, 12, 19, 30, 0),
                        ProgrammeID = "20260301"
                    });
                    try
                    {
                        context.SaveChanges();
                    }
                    catch (DbUpdateException ex)
                    {
                        // Ł½┬I”b InnerExceptionĪA│oĘ|┼Ńź▄ SQL Server ¬║Łņź═┐∙╗~
                        var message = ex.InnerException?.Message ?? ex.Message;
                        Console.WriteLine("ĖĻ«Ų«w│°┐∙ż║«e: " + message);
                    }
                }

                //▓╝░Ž
                if (!context.TicketsArea.Any())
                {
                    context.TicketsArea.AddRange(
                    new TicketsArea
                    {
                        TicketsAreaID = "202601010101",
                        TicketsAreaName = "Ęn║u░Ž",
                        TicketsAreaStatusID = "I",
                        RowCount=10,
                        SeatCount=10,
                        Price = 3500,
                        VenueID = "A01",
                        SessionID = "2026010101"
                    },
                    new TicketsArea
                    {
                        TicketsAreaID = "202601010102",
                        TicketsAreaName = "żG╝ė¼▌źx░Ž",
                        TicketsAreaStatusID = "I",
                        RowCount = 10,
                        SeatCount = 10,
                        Price = 2500,
                        VenueID = "A02",
                        SessionID = "2026010101"
                    },
                    new TicketsArea
                    {
                        TicketsAreaID = "202601010103",
                        TicketsAreaName = "Ą°Įuź[▒j░Ž",
                        TicketsAreaStatusID = "I",
                        RowCount = 10,
                        SeatCount = 10,
                        Price = 1500,
                        VenueID = "A02",
                        SessionID = "2026010101"
                    });
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }
                


                //Łq│µ

                if (!context.Order.Any())
                {
                    context.Order.AddRange(
                     new Order
                     {
                         OrderID = "20261201000001",
                         OrderCreatedTime = DateTime.Now,
                         PaymentTradeNO=Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
                         PaymentDescription="½Hź╬źdźI┤┌”©ź\",
                         PaymentStatus=true,
                         PaidTime = new DateTime(2026, 12, 1, 16, 00, 00),
                         MemberID = guidMember[0],
                         PaymentMethodID = "A",
                         OrderStatusID = "Y",
                         SessionID = "2026010101",
                         
                     },
                     new Order
                     {
                         OrderID = "20261201000002",
                         OrderCreatedTime = DateTime.Now,
                         PaymentTradeNO=Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
                         PaymentDescription=null,
                         PaymentStatus=false,
                         PaidTime = null,
                         MemberID = guidMember[1],
                         PaymentMethodID = "A",
                         OrderStatusID = "N",
                         SessionID = "2026020101",
                         
                     },
                     new Order
                     {
                         OrderID = "20261201000003",
                         OrderCreatedTime = DateTime.Now,
                         PaidTime = new DateTime(2026, 12, 3, 14, 20, 00),
                         PaymentTradeNO=Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
                         PaymentDescription="½Hź╬źdźI┤┌”©ź\",
                         PaymentStatus=true,
                         MemberID = guidMember[2],
                         PaymentMethodID = "C",
                         OrderStatusID = "Y",
                         SessionID = "2026030101",
                         
                     }
                    );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }

                //▓╝©ķ
                string[] guidTickets = { Guid.NewGuid().ToString(), Guid.NewGuid().ToString(), Guid.NewGuid().ToString() };
                if (!context.Tickets.Any())
                {
                    context.Tickets.AddRange(
                    new Tickets
                    {
                        TicketsID = guidTickets[0],
                        RowIndex= 1,
                        SeatIndex= 1,
                        CreatedTime = DateTime.Now,
                        ScannedTime = new DateTime(2027, 1, 10, 16, 30, 0),
                        RefundTime = null,
                        TicketsAreaID = "202601010101",
                        SessionID = "2026010101",
                        TicketsStatusID = "N",
                        OrderID = "20261201000001"
                    },
                    new Tickets
                    {
                        TicketsID = guidTickets[1],
                        RowIndex = 2,
                        SeatIndex = 2,
                        CreatedTime = DateTime.Now,
                        ScannedTime = new DateTime(2027, 1, 11, 16, 30, 0),
                        RefundTime = null,
                        TicketsAreaID = "202601010101",
                        SessionID = "2026010101",
                        TicketsStatusID = "N",
                        OrderID = "20261201000002"
                    },
                    new Tickets
                    {
                        TicketsID = guidTickets[2],
                        RowIndex = 3,
                        SeatIndex = 3,
                        CreatedTime = DateTime.Now,
                        ScannedTime = new DateTime(2027, 1, 12, 17, 30, 0),
                        RefundTime = null,
                        TicketsAreaID = "202601010101",
                        TicketsStatusID = "N",
                        SessionID = "2026010101",
                        OrderID = "20261201000003"
                    }
                    );
                    context.SaveChanges();
                }





            }
        }
    }
}

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;
using System.Diagnostics;
using TicketSalesSystem.ViewModel;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class Session
    {
        [Key]
        [Column(TypeName = "char(10)")]
        [DatabaseGenerated(DatabaseGeneratedOption.None)] // ¦iČD EFĪGID ¼Oźč SQL ©ń╝Ų║Ō”nČŪČi©ė¬║”r”Ļ
        public string SessionID { get; set; }= null!;

        [Display(Name = "Č}Įµ«╔ČĪ")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        [DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:yyyy”~MMżļddżķ hh:mm:ss}")]
        public DateTime SaleStartTime { get; set; } 

        [Display(Name = "░▒░Ō«╔ČĪ")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        [DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:yyyy”~MMżļddżķ hh:mm:ss}")]
        public DateTime SaleEndTime { get; set; }

        [Display(Name = "║tźXżķ┤┴")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        [DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:yyyy”~MMżļddżķ HH:mm}")]
        public DateTime StartTime { get; set; }


        //FK░Ž
        public string ProgrammeID { get; set; } = null!;
        

        //├÷┴p░Ž
        public virtual Programme? Programme { get; set; }   
        public virtual List<Order>? Order { get; set; }      
        public virtual List<TicketsArea>? TicketsArea { get; set; }
        public virtual List<Tickets>? Tickets { get; set; }





        
       
    }
}

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class Tickets
    {
        [Key]
        [Display(Name = "▓╝©ķĖ╣ĮX")]
        [StringLength(36, MinimumLength = 36)]
        public string TicketsID { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "▒Ų")]
        public int RowIndex { get; set; }
        [Display(Name = "Ė╣")]
        public int SeatIndex { get; set; }

        [Display(Name = "░h▓╝│B▓z«╔ČĪ")]
        [DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        [DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:yyyy/MM/dd  hh:mm:ss}")]
        public DateTime? RefundTime { get; set; }//░h▓╝│B▓z«╔ČĪ

        [Display(Name = "½žź▀«╔ČĪ")]
        [DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        [DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:yyyy/MM/dd  hh:mm:ss}")]
        public DateTime CreatedTime { get; set; }= DateTime.Now;

        [Display(Name = "«ųŠPČi│§«╔ČĪ")]
        [DataType(DataType.DateTime)]
        [DisplayFormat(DataFormatString = "{0:yyyy/MM/dd}")]
        public DateTime? ScannedTime { get; set; }//«ųŠPČi│§«╔ČĪ

        [Display(Name = "«ųŠPĮX")]
        [StringLength(12)]
        public string? CheckInCode { get; set; }//«ųŠPĮX


        //FK             

        public string TicketsStatusID { get; set; } = null!;   
        public string OrderID { get; set; } = null!;
        public string SessionID { get; set; } = null!;
        public string TicketsAreaID { get; set; } = null!;

        //├÷┴p░Ž       
        public virtual TicketsStatus? TicketsStatus { get; set; }       
        public virtual Order? Order { get; set; }
        public virtual Session? Session { get; set; }
        public virtual TicketsArea? TicketsArea { get; set; }


    }
}

using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Migrations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;

namespace TicketSalesSystem.Models
{
    public class TicketsArea
    {
        [Key]
        [Column(TypeName = "nchar(12)")]
        [DatabaseGenerated(DatabaseGeneratedOption.None)] // ¦iČD EFĪGID ¼Oźč SQL ©ń╝Ų║Ō”nČŪČi©ė¬║”r”Ļ
        public string TicketsAreaID { get; set; } = null!;

        [Display(Name = "▓╝░Ž")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [StringLength(20, MinimumLength = 2, ErrorMessage = "Įą┐ķżJ2~20Łė”r")]
        public string TicketsAreaName { get; set; } = null!;
              
        [Display(Name = "©C░Ž┴`▒Ų╝Ų")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [Range(0, 50, ErrorMessage = ("▒Ų╝Ų¼░0~50ż¦ČĪ"))]
        public int RowCount { get; set; }

        [Display(Name = "©C▒Ų┴`«y”ņ╝Ų")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [Range(0, 50, ErrorMessage = ("▒Ų╝Ų¼░0~50ż¦ČĪ"))]
        public int SeatCount { get; set; }

        [Display(Name = "▓╝╗∙")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "ź▓Č±")]
        [Column(TypeName = "Money")]
        [Range(0, 100000, ErrorMessage = "▓╝╗∙ź▓ČĘ”b 0 ©ņ 100,000 ż¦ČĪ")]
        public decimal Price { get; set; }

        [Display(Name = "«w”sČq")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "┴`«y”ņ╝Ų¼░ź▓Č±")]
        [Range(0, 100000, ErrorMessage = "╝ŲČqżŻ»Ó¼░Łt╝Ų")]
        public int Capacity { get; set; } = 0;

        [Display(Name = "│čŠl▓╝╝Ų")]
        [Required(ErrorMessage = "│čŠl▓╝╝Ų¼░ź▓Č±")]
        [Range(0, 100000, ErrorMessage = "╝ŲČqżŻ»Ó¼░Łt╝Ų")]
        public int Remaining { get; set; } = 0;

        //FK
        public string TicketsAreaStatusID { get; set; } = null!;
        public string VenueID { get; set; } = null!;
        public string SessionID { get; set; } = null!;
        


        //├÷┴p
        public virtual TicketsAreaStatus? TicketsAreaStatus { get; set; }        
        public virtual Venue? Venue { get; set; }
       
        public virtual Session? Session { get; set; }

        public virtual List<Tickets>? Tickets { get; set; }


    }
}

================================================================================
FILE: \TicketSalesSystem\Models\TicketsContext.cs
