@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(function() {
            $(document).on("click", "#btnSendSMS", function() {
                var $btn = $(this);
                $btn.prop('disabled', true).text("SYNCING...");

                $.post("/Members/SendSmsCode", { id: "@Model.MemberID" }, function(res) {
                    if (res.success) {
                        $("#inputVerifyCode").val("");
                        $("#verifyBox").slideDown();
                        startTimer(60, $btn);
                    } else {
                        alert(res.message);
                        $btn.prop('disabled', false).text("RETRY_SIGNAL");
                    }
                }).fail(function() {
                    alert("SYSTEM_CRITICAL_ERROR");
                    $btn.prop('disabled', false).text("RETRY_SIGNAL");
                });
            });

            function startTimer(duration, $button) {
                var timer = duration;
                var interval = setInterval(function () {
                    var seconds = parseInt(timer % 60, 10);
                    $button.text(seconds + "s RE-ARM");
                    if (--timer < 0) {
                        clearInterval(interval);
                        $button.prop('disabled', false).text("RE-SEND SIGNAL");
                    }
                }, 1000);
            }

            $(document).on("click", "#btnSubmitSMS", function() {
                var code = $("#inputVerifyCode").val();
                if (code.length < 6) {
                    alert("INVALID_SIGNAL_LENGTH");
                    return;
                }
                $.post("/Members/SubmitVerifyCode", { id: "@Model.MemberID", inputCode: code }, function(res) {
                    if (res.success) {
                        location.reload();
                    } else {
                        alert("? VERIFICATION_FAILED: " + res.message);
                        $("#inputVerifyCode").val("");
                    }
                });
            });
        });
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {

    <script>
        // Šį│N─Ąź▄┼▐┐Ķ
        const statusSelect = document.querySelector('#OrderStatusID');
        const initialVal = statusSelect.value;
        statusSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
            if (['C', 'N'].includes(this.value)) {
                if (!confirm("?? [¬`ĘN!!]\n\n”╣Š▐¦@▒NĘ|Ą∙ŠP®ę”│├÷┴p▓╝©ķ©├─└®±«y”ņ«w”sĪC\nĖėĄ{¦Ū¼░żŻźi░f┬Óż¦©MĄ”ĪCĮT®wŁn░§”µČ▄ĪH")) {
                    this.value = initialVal;
                }
            }
        });
    </script>
}

    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-5 tech-label border-bottom border-info border-opacity-25 pb-3">
        <h1 class="neon-header m-0">
            <i class="bi bi-cart-check-fill me-3"></i>@ViewData["Title"]

    document.getElementById('imageInput').onchange = function (evt) {
        const [file] = this.files;

            const preview = document.getElementById('imagePreview');
            preview.src = URL.createObjectURL(file);
            preview.classList.remove('d-none');

    };

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }

    <script>
        let sessionIndex = @Model.Session.Count;

        document.getElementById('btnAddSession').addEventListener('click', function () {
            const container = document.getElementById('sessionContainer');

            // ?? Łū¦’ĪGJS ╝ę¬Oż║¬║®ę”│╝ą┼ę│Ż«Mź╬ tech- ├■¦OĪAĮT½OżŻ┼▄źš®│
            const html = `
                <div class="session-item-tech">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
                        <h6 class="text-info fw-bold mb-0"># ¦ŪĖ╣.<span class="row-number">${sessionIndex + 1}</span></h6>
                        <i class="bi bi-trash3-fill remove-session-btn remove-session"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div class="row g-4">
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <label class="tech-label">> ¼Ī░╩║tźX«╔ČĪ</label>
                            <input name="Session[${sessionIndex}].StartTime" class="form-control tech-input" type="datetime-local" required />
                            <span class="field-validation-valid text-danger small" data-valmsg-for="Session[${sessionIndex}].StartTime" data-valmsg-replace="true"></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <label class="tech-label">> ▒ę░Ō«╔ČĪ</label>
                            <input name="Session[${sessionIndex}].SaleStartTime" class="form-control tech-input" type="datetime-local" required />
                            <span class="field-validation-valid text-danger small" data-valmsg-for="Session[${sessionIndex}].SaleStartTime" data-valmsg-replace="true"></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col-md-4">
                            <label class="tech-label">> ║IżŅŠP░Ō«╔ČĪ</label>
                            <input name="Session[${sessionIndex}].SaleEndTime" class="form-control tech-input" type="datetime-local" required />
                            <span class="field-validation-valid text-danger small" data-valmsg-for="Session[${sessionIndex}].SaleEndTime" data-valmsg-replace="true"></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;

            container.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html);
            sessionIndex++;

            // Ł½ĘsĖč¬R┼ń├ę
            const form = document.getElementById('sessionForm');
            $(form).removeData("validator").removeData("unobtrusiveValidation");
            $.validator.unobtrusive.parse(form);
        });

        // │B▓z¦R░Żź\»Ó
        document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            if (e.target.classList.contains('remove-session')) {
                e.target.closest('.session-item-tech').remove();
                reIndexSessions();
            }
        });

        function reIndexSessions() {
            const items = document.querySelectorAll('.session-item-tech');
            sessionIndex = 0;
            items.forEach((item, index) => {
                item.querySelector('.row-number').innerText = index + 1;
                item.querySelectorAll('input').forEach(input => {
                    const name = input.getAttribute('name');
                    if (name) {
                        input.setAttribute('name', name.replace(/\[\d+\]/, `[${index}]`));
                        // ”P«╔¦¾Ęs validation span ¬║ data-valmsg-for
                        const span = input.closest('div').querySelector('.field-validation-valid, .field-validation-error');
                        if (span) {
                            const valMsg = span.getAttribute('data-valmsg-for');
                            if (valMsg) span.setAttribute('data-valmsg-for', valMsg.replace(/\[\d+\]/, `[${index}]`));
                        }
                    }
                });
                sessionIndex++;
            });
        }
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    <partial name="_ValidationScriptsPartial" />
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function () {

            // ¬ņ®lżŲ
            $(".area-table select").each(function() { syncDataFromTemplate($(this)); });
            updateAllTotalsAndValidation();

            // ?? ”P©B│§└]¬½▓zŁŁ©Ņ╝ŲŠ┌
            function syncDataFromTemplate($select) {
                const val = $select.val();
                if (!val) return;
                const $templateOpt = $(`#venue-template option[value="${val}"]`);
                const $currentOpt = $select.find("option:selected");
                $currentOpt.data("max-row", $templateOpt.data("max-row"));
                $currentOpt.data("max-seat", $templateOpt.data("max-seat"));
            }

            // ?? ┼ń├ę│µ”µ┼▐┐Ķ (ź[żJ¼§”Ō─Ą¦┘╝╦”Ī)
            function validateRow($row) {
                const $selectOpt = $row.find("select option:selected");
                const maxR = parseInt($selectOpt.data("max-row")) || 0;
                const maxS = parseInt($selectOpt.data("max-seat")) || 0;
                const currR = parseInt($row.find(".row-count").val()) || 0;
                const currS = parseInt($row.find(".seat-count").val()) || 0;

                const total = currR * currS;
                $row.find(".total-seats").text(total.toLocaleString());

                let errorMsg = "";
                if (maxR > 0 && currR > maxR) errorMsg = `▒Ų╝ŲżWŁŁĘĖźX (MAX: ${maxR})`;
                else if (maxS > 0 && currS > maxS) errorMsg = `«y”ņżWŁŁĘĖźX (MAX: ${maxS})`;

                if (errorMsg !== "") {
                    $row.find(".tech-input").addClass("row-error");
                    if (!$row.find(".error-msg").length) {
                        $row.find("td:nth-child(5)").append(`<span class="error-msg">${errorMsg}</span>`);
                    } else {
                        $row.find(".error-msg").text(errorMsg);
                    }
                } else {
                    $row.find(".tech-input").removeClass("row-error");
                    $row.find(".error-msg").remove();
                }
                checkFormValidity();
            }

            function checkFormValidity() {
                const hasError = $(".row-error").length > 0;
                $('#btnSubmit').prop("disabled", hasError);
            }

            function updateAllTotalsAndValidation() {
                $(".area-row").each(function () { validateRow($(this)); });
            }

            // ©Ųź¾║╩┼ź
            $(document).on("input change", ".row-count, .seat-count, .area-table select", function () {
                const $row = $(this).closest("tr");
                if ($(this).is("select")) syncDataFromTemplate($(this));
                validateRow($row);
            });

            // ╝Wź[▓╝░Ž (JS ╝ę¬O”P©B«Mź╬ tech-input)
            $(document).on("click", ".add-area-btn", function () {
                const container = $(this).closest(".session-container");
                const sIdx = container.data("session-index");
                const tbody = container.find(".area-tbody");
                const tIdx = tbody.find(".area-row").length;
                const venueOptions = $('#venue-template').html();

                const newRow = `
                    <tr class="area-row text-center">
                        <td><select name="Session[${sIdx}].TicketsArea[${tIdx}].VenueID" class="form-select tech-input" required>${venueOptions}</select></td>
                        <td><input name="Session[${sIdx}].TicketsArea[${tIdx}].TicketsAreaName" class="form-control tech-input" placeholder="░ŽČ¶”W║┘" required /></td>
                        <td><input name="Session[${sIdx}].TicketsArea[${tIdx}].RowCount" type="number" class="form-control tech-input text-center row-count" value="1" min="1" /></td>
                        <td><input name="Session[${sIdx}].TicketsArea[${tIdx}].SeatCount" type="number" class="form-control tech-input text-center seat-count" value="1" min="1" /></td>
                        <td><span class="total-seats neon-text-sharp text-info">1</span></td>
                        <td>
                            <div class="input-group">
                                <span class="input-group-text bg-transparent text-info border-info border-opacity-25">$</span>
                                <input name="Session[${sIdx}].TicketsArea[${tIdx}].Price" type="number" class="form-control tech-input text-end" value="0" min="0" />
                            </div>
                        </td>
                        <td><button type="button" class="bg-transparent border-0 text-danger remove-area"><i class="bi bi-trash3-fill fs-4"></i></button></td>
                    </tr>`;

                const $newRow = $(newRow).hide();
                tbody.append($newRow);
                $newRow.fadeIn(300);
                validateRow($newRow);
            });

            $(document).on("click", ".remove-area", function () {
                const row = $(this).closest("tr");
                row.fadeOut(300, function () {
                    row.remove();
                    checkFormValidity();
                });
            });
        });
    </script>
}

        @* --- 1. ¼Ī░╩½╩Ł▒╣Ž --- *@

                        <i class="bi bi-info-circle me-1"></i> ½ž─│Ėč¬R½ūĪG1200 x 600 ╣│»└

        <script>
            function viewProtocol(title, content) {
                // ▒└┬╦©Žź╬ SweetAlert2 ®╬¼O”█®wĖq Modal
                Swal.fire({
                    title: `<span style="color: #00f2ff; font-family: 'Share Tech Mono'; font-weight: 800;">${title}</span>`,
                    html: `<div style="text-align: left; color: #fff; opacity: 0.8; white-space: pre-line; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.8;">${content}</div>`,
                    background: 'rgba(0, 11, 26, 0.95)',
                    backdrop: 'rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.1)',
                    confirmButtonText: 'ACKNOWLEDGE',
                    confirmButtonColor: '#00f2ff',
                    customClass: {
                        popup: 'cyber-card' // ┼²╝uĄĪż]©Ń│Ų┴╔│š▒ūż┴©ż
                    }
                });
            }
        </script>

}

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $('.status-toggle').change(function () {
            const checkbox = $(this);
            const noticeId = checkbox.data('id');
            const indicator = $('#statusIndicator');
            const token = $('input[name="__RequestVerificationToken"]').val();

            // Ą°─▒╣w§X
            indicator.css('opacity', '0.5');

            $.ajax({
                url: '@Url.Action("ToggleStatus", "PublicNotices")',
                type: 'POST',
                data: { id: noticeId, __RequestVerificationToken: token },
                success: function (res) {
                    indicator.css('opacity', '1');
                    if (res.success) {
                        // ?? ░╩║A¦¾Ęs¼░▓┼”X CSS │WĮd¬║ Badge
                        if (res.newStatus) {
                            indicator.html('<div class="status-badge"><span class="status-badge-icon">?</span> żwżW¼[</div>');
                        } else {
                            indicator.html('<div class="status-badge" style="color: #ff3333; border-color: #ff3333; background-color: rgba(26, 0, 0, 0.6) !important;"><span class="status-badge-icon" style="background-color: #ff3333;">?</span> ź╝żW¼[</div>');
                        }
                    } else {
                        alert(res.message);
                        checkbox.prop('checked', !checkbox.prop('checked'));
                    }
                },
                error: function () {
                    indicator.css('opacity', '1');
                    alert("│sĮuźó▒č / PROTOCOL_ERR");
                    checkbox.prop('checked', !checkbox.prop('checked'));
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    <script>
          $(document).ready(function () {
            console.log("INQUIRY_TERMINAL_ONLINE");

            // Modal ┼Ńź▄«╔¦ņĖĻ«Ų
            $('#typeManagerModal').on('show.bs.modal', function () {
                refreshTypeList();
            });
        });

        function refreshTypeList() {
            var targetUrl = "@Url.Action("GetPartialList", "QuestionTypes")";
            $("#typeManagerContent").load(targetUrl, function(response, status, xhr) {
                if (status == "error") {
                    alert("PROTOCOL_ERR: │sĮuźó▒čĪAĮą└╦¼d”°¬AŠ╣¬¼║AĪC");
                }
            });
        }

        // Ęs╝Wż└├■
        function addNewType() {
            var name = $("#newTypeName").val();
            if (!name) return alert("INPUT_ERR: Įą┐ķżJż└├■”W║┘");

            $.post("@Url.Action("QuickCreate", "QuestionTypes")", { name: name }, function (data) {
                if (data.success) {
                    $("#newTypeName").val("");
                    refreshTypeList();
                } else {
                    alert("ERROR: " + data.message);
                }
            });
        }

        // Łū¦’ż└├■”W║┘
        function editType(id, oldName) {
            var newName = prompt("Įą┐ķżJĘs¬║ż└├■”W║┘ĪG", oldName);
            if (newName && newName !== oldName) {
                $.post("@Url.Action("Edit", "QuestionTypes")", { id: id, name:newName  }, function(data) {
                    if (data.success) refreshTypeList();
                    else alert("Łū¦’źó▒č");
                });
            }
        }

        // ¦R░Żż└├■ (”p¬G©S│]¬¼║A─µ”ņĪA┤N¬Į▒Ą¦R░Ż)
        function deleteType(id) {
            if (confirm("ĮT®wŁn¦R░Ż”╣ż└├■Č▄ĪHĪ]ŁYżw”│┐įĖ▀©Žź╬”╣ż└├■▒NĄL¬k¦R░ŻĪ^")) {
                // │oĖ╠╣’└│¦A Controller ż║½ž¬║ DeleteConfirmed ®╬”█Łqż@Łė AjaxDelete
                $.post("/QuestionTypes/Delete", { id: id }, function(data) {
                    if (data.success) refreshTypeList();
                    else alert("¦R░Żźó▒čĪAźi»Óżw”│ĖĻ«Ų├÷┴pĪC");
                });
            }
        }


    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }

    <script>
        let selectedSeats = [];
        let TotalAmount=0;

        // 1. ”█░╩░t”ņź\»Ó
        document.getElementById('autoBtn').onclick = async function() {
            const response = await fetch('/Seats/AutoAssign', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    SessionID: "@ViewBag.SessionID",
                    AreaID: "@ViewBag.AreaID",
                    VenueID: "V001", // │oĖ╠Łn¦’¼░¦AĖĻ«Ų«w╣Ļ╗┌”│¬║ VenueID
                    Count: 2
                })
            });
            const result = await response.json();
            if(result.success) {
                selectedSeats = result.seats;
                document.getElementById('statusMsg').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-success">żw”█░╩┐’”ņĪG${selectedSeats.join(', ')}</div>`;
                document.getElementById('submitBtn').disabled = false;
            } else {
                alert(result.message);
            }
        };

        // 2. ░eźXŁq│µ©├▓ŻźX®·▓ė
        document.getElementById('submitBtn').onclick = async function() {
            const bookingData = {
                SessionID: "@ViewBag.SessionID",
                AreaID: "@ViewBag.TicketsAreaID",
                MemberID: "83542560-1941-48b9-af77-00fc42536fed", // ?? Ł½ŁnĪGĮąĮT╗{ĖĻ«Ų«w Member ¬Ē¼O¦_”│ M001
                PaymentMethodID: "C", // ?? Ł½ŁnĪGĮąĮT╗{ĖĻ«Ų«w PaymentMethod ¬Ē¼O¦_”│ P01
                Seats: selectedSeats,
                TotalAmount=TotalAmount
            };

                try {
            // 2. Ąo░eĮą©D
            const response = await fetch('/Seats/ConfirmBooking', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify(bookingData) // ĮT½O│oĖ╠┼▄╝Ų”W║┘╣’żF
            });

            // 3. Ėč¬R JSON
            const result = await response.json();

            // 4. «┌Š┌Ą▓¬G░§”µĖ§┬Ó®╬┤Żź▄
            if (result.success) {
                // ? ¼JĄMŁnĖ§┬ÓĪA┤N¬Į▒ĄŠ╔”V Success Action
                // ¬`ĘNĪGresult.orderID ¬║żjżp╝g╗▌╗P½ß║▌ VMBookingResponse ®wĖqż@ŁP
                window.location.href = '/Seats/Success/' + result.orderID;
            } else {
                alert("Łq┴╩źó▒čĪG" + result.message);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            console.error("Ąoź═┐∙╗~:", error);
            alert("©t▓╬Ąoź═▓¦▒`ĪAĮąČ}▒ę F12 └╦¼d Console");
        }
        };
    </script>
}

<div id="timerContainer" style="display:none;" class="alert alert-warning">

@section Scripts {

    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }

    <script>
        let currentSession = "";
        let currentArea = "";
        let currentVenue = "";
        let currentPrice=0;

        //Ł╦╝ŲŁp«╔
        function startTimer(duration, display) {
            let timer = parseInt(duration);
            if (isNaN(timer))
            {
            timer = 600;
            }
            // ”p¬Gż¦½eżwĖg”│Łp«╔Š╣”bČ]ĪAź²▓M▒╝ź”źH¦K┼|ź[
            if (window.bookingInterval) clearInterval(window.bookingInterval);

            function updateDisplay()
            {
            let minutes = Math.floor(timer / 60);
            let seconds = timer%10;
             minutes = minutes < 10 ? "0" + minutes : minutes;
             seconds = seconds < 10 ? "0" + seconds : seconds;
             display.textContent = `${minutes}:${seconds}`;
            }

            updateDisplay();

            window.bookingInterval = setInterval(function () {
            if (timer-- < 0)
            {
                 clearInterval(window.bookingInterval);
                 display.textContent = "00:00";
                 alert("? «╔ČĪ©ņĪI▒z¬║Łq”ņżw│Q©·«°ĪAĮąŁ½Ęs┐’Š▄«y”ņĪC");
                 location.reload();
                 return;
            }
            updateDisplay();
            }, 1000);
        }

        // 1. ┬I┐’│§”Ė
        document.querySelectorAll('.session-item').forEach(btn => {
            btn.onclick = async function() {
                currentSession = this.dataset.id;

                // ż┴┤½╝╦”Ī
                document.querySelectorAll('.session-item').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
                this.classList.add('active');
                try {
                // ¦ņ©·▓╝░Ž
                const res = await fetch(`/Seats/GetAreasBySession?sessionId=${currentSession}`);
                const areas = await res.json();

                console.log(areas);

                let areaHtml = areas.map(a => `
                    <div class="col-md-4 mb-3">
                        <div class="card area-card p-3 border-primary" style="cursor:pointer"
                             onclick="selectArea(
                                '${a.ticketsAreaID}',
                                '${a.ticketsAreaName}',
                                ${a.price},
                                '${a.venueID}'
                             )">
                            <h5>${a.ticketsAreaName}</h5>
                            <p class="text-danger">$${a.price}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `).join('');


                document.getElementById('areaList').innerHTML = areaHtml;
                document.getElementById('areaSection').style.display = 'block';
                document.getElementById('bookingSection').style.display = 'none';
                } catch (err) {
                console.error("¦ņ©·▓╝░Žźó▒č:", err);
            }
            };
        });

        // 2. ┐’Š▄▓╝░Ž
        function selectArea(id, name, price, venueId) {
            currentArea = id;
            currentVenue = venueId;
            currentPrice = price;


            document.getElementById('selectedInfo').innerText = `żw┐’│§”ĖĪG${currentSession} | ▓╝░ŽĪG${name} ($${price})`;
            document.getElementById('bookingSection').style.display = 'block';
        }

               // 3. ż@┴õ░t”ņ©├┴╩▓╝ (¬Į▒Ą®IźsŠŃ”XżF░t”ņ┼▐┐Ķ¬║ ConfirmBooking)
               document.getElementById('autoAndConfirmBtn').onclick = async function() {
            try {
                // 1. ¦ņ©·ĄeŁ▒żW┐’│µ¬║▒i╝Ų (│o”µż@®wŁnź[ĪI)
                const ticketCountElement = document.getElementById('ticketCount');
                const countValue = parseInt(ticketCountElement.value);

                // 2. ½žź▀Įą©D¬½ź¾
                const bookingData = {
                    VenueID:currentVenue,
                    SessionID: currentSession,
                    TicketsAreaID: currentArea,
                    MemberID: "008783c7-31da-4d39-bba4-70ceed5939e4",
                    PaymentMethodID: "A",
                    Count:countValue, // ĮT½O”W║┘╗P½ß║▌ ViewModel ż@ŁP
                    TotalAmount:currentPrice*countValue,
                    Seat:[]
                };

                // 3. Ąo░eĮą©D
                const res = await fetch('/Seats/ConfirmBooking', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(bookingData)
                });

                // ”p¬G”°¬AŠ╣”^ČŪ 404 ®╬ 500
                if (!res.ok) {
                    alert(`”°¬AŠ╣┐∙╗~: ${res.status}`);
                    return;
                }

                const result = await res.json();

            if (result.success) {
                console.log("½ß║▌”^ČŪĖĻ«Ų:", result);

                // 1. ▒N«y”ņ«µ”Ī└użŲ (©ę”p 1-1 ┼▄”© 1▒Ų1Ė╣)
                const seatDisplay = result.seats.map(s => s.replace('-', '▒Ų') + 'Ė╣').join(', ');

                // 2. ©·▒o½ß║▌Łp║ŌźX¬║┴`¬„├B (░▓│]½ß║▌”^ČŪ─µ”ņ”W¼░ totalAmount)
                const formattedAmount = new Intl.NumberFormat('zh-TW',
                {
                    style: 'currency',
                    currency: 'TWD',
                    maximumFractionDigits: 0
                })
                .format(result.finalAmount);

                // 3. ”b Alert żżź[żJ¬„├BĖĻ░T
                alert(`??Łq┴╩”©ź\ĪI«y”ņżw¼░▒z½O»d 10 ż└─┴ĪC\n\n` +
                      `?? Łq│µĮsĖ╣ĪG${result.orderID}\n` +
                      `?? ż└░t«y”ņĪG${seatDisplay}\n` +
                      `?? └│źI┴`├BĪG${formattedAmount}`+`Įą”bŁ╦╝ŲĄ▓¦¶½e¦╣”©źI┤┌ĪC`);

                //Ł╦╝ŲŁp«╔Š╣
                const timeDiv=document.getElementById('timerContainer');
                const display=document.querySelector('#countdownTimer');

                if(timeDiv&&display)
                {
                    timeDiv.style.display = 'block';
                    startTimer(result.RemainingSeconds, display);
                }

                // // 4. Ė§┬Ó”▄”©ź\ŁČŁ▒
                // window.location.href = "/Orders/Details/" + result.orderID;

            } else {
                // ”p¬G½ß║▌”^ČŪźó▒č (©ę”pĪG│s─“«y”ņżŻ©¼ĪBĖĻ«Ų«w┐∙╗~)
                alert("? Łq┴╩źó▒čĪG" + result.message);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            // «Ę«╗ fetch ╣LĄ{żż¬║║¶Ė¶┐∙╗~®╬Ą{”Ī░§”µ┐∙╗~
            console.error("Ėį▓ė┐∙╗~░T«¦:", error);
            alert("?? ©t▓╬│sĮuĄoź═▓¦▒`ĪAĮą└╦¼d║¶Ė¶¬¼║A®╬┴p├┤║▐▓zŁ¹ĪC");
        }
        };


    </script>
}

                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>

            @* --- ?? »B░╩Łq┴╩ĮT╗{░Ž --- *@
            <div id="bookingSection" class="mt-4" style="display:none;">
                <div class="pixel-container-box border-pixel-pink p-0 overflow-hidden shadow-lg">
                    <div class="p-3 bg-pixel-pink text-dark fw-bold">
                        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> <span class="text-white" id="selectedInfo"></span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="p-3">
                        <label class="text-pixel-blue fs-pixel-small mb-2 d-block">╝ŲČq</label>
                        <div class="input-group">
                            @if (ViewBag.RemainingQuota > 0)

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        let currentSession = "@Model.SessionID";
        let currentArea = "";
        let currentVenue = "";
        let currentPrice = 0;
        let captchaCode = "";

        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
            if (document.getElementById('captchaCanvas')) {
                generateCaptcha();
            }
        });

        function generateCaptcha() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('captchaCanvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.font = "bold 38px Arial"; ctx.fillStyle = "#003a8c";
            const chars = "ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789";
            captchaCode = "";
            for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                let char = chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length));
                captchaCode += char;
                ctx.save(); ctx.translate(45 * i + 30, 45); ctx.rotate((Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.4);
                ctx.fillText(char, 0, 0); ctx.restore();
            }
        }

        // --- ?? Łū¦’┬I 1ĪG╝Wź[½÷Čs¬¼║A”^§X ---
        async function verifyGateCaptcha() {
               const input = document.getElementById('captchaInput').value.toUpperCase();
                if (input.length < 4) {
                    alert("Įą┐ķżJ¦╣ŠŃ┼ń├ęĮXĪI");
                    return;
                }

            const btn = event.currentTarget;
            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.innerHTML = `<span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> ┼ń├ężż...`;

            try {
                const res = await fetch(`/Seats/VerifyGateCaptcha`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
                    body: new URLSearchParams({
                        id: currentSession,
                        captchaInput: input
                        // ?? ¬`ĘNĪGżŻŁnČŪ░eź┐ĮTĄ¬«ūĄ╣½ß║▌ĪA½ß║▌└│Ėė”█żv▒q MemoryCache «│
                    })
                });
                const result = await res.json();

                if (result.success) {
                    // ┼ń├ę”©ź\½ß¬║¼yĄ{║¹½∙Łņ╝╦...
                    document.getElementById('securityGate').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('waitingRoom').style.display = 'flex';
                    startQueuePolling();
                } else {
                    alert(result.message);
                    generateCaptcha(); // źó▒č┤N┤½ż@▒i
                    btn.disabled = false;
                    btn.innerHTML = `┼ń├ę©├ČiżJ┐’”ņ <i class="bi bi-shield-lock ms-1"></i>`;
                }
            } catch (e) {
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.innerHTML = `┼ń├ę©├ČiżJ┐’”ņ <i class="bi bi-shield-lock ms-1"></i>`;
                alert("│sĮu▓¦▒`ĪAĮąŁ½ĘsŠŃ▓zŁČŁ▒ĪC");
            }
        }

        function startQueuePolling() {
            const pollInterval = setInterval(async () => {
                const res = await fetch(`/Seats/CheckQueueStatus?id=${currentSession}`);
                const data = await res.json();

                if (data.canEnter) {
                    clearInterval(pollInterval);
                    unlockContent();
                }
            }, 2500);
        }

        function unlockContent() {
            document.getElementById('waitingRoom').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('mainPurchaseContent').style.display = 'flex';
            document.getElementById('stepBadge').innerHTML = "©BŲJ 2: ┐’Š▄▓╝░Ž";
            document.getElementById('stepBadge').className = "badge bg-primary px-3 py-2";
        }

        function selectArea(id, name, price, venueId) {
            currentArea = id; currentVenue = venueId; currentPrice = price;
            document.querySelectorAll('.area-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');
            document.getElementById('selectedInfo').innerHTML = `<i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> ${name} - $${price.toLocaleString()}`;
            $("#bookingSection").fadeIn();
        }

        // --- ?? Łū¦’┬I 2ĪG╝Wź[©Š¦b└╦¼dĪB½÷Čs LoadingĪB╝Wź[ź■┐├╣§┬Ó░ķ░ķ«─¬G ---
        async function confirmBooking() {
            // 1. ©Š¦b└╦¼d
            if (!currentArea) {
                alert("Įąź²┐’Š▄▓╝░ŽĪI");
                return;
            }

            // 2. ©·▒oź■┐├╣§ĄźŁį½ŪżĖ»└
            const waitingRoom = document.getElementById('waitingRoom');
            const btn = event.currentTarget;
            const originalHtml = btn.innerHTML;

            // 3. ?? ▒ę░╩ź■┐├╣§┬Ó░ķ░ķ
            waitingRoom.style.display = 'flex';

            // Łū¦’┬Ó░ķ░ķżÕ”rĪA┼²©Žź╬¬╠¬Š╣D▓{”b¼OĪuŁq┴╩żżĪv
            const waitingText = waitingRoom.querySelector('h4');
            if (waitingText) waitingText.innerText = "ź┐”b¼░▒z╣w»d«y”ņĪAĮąĄyŁį...";

            const count = parseInt(document.getElementById('ticketCount').value);
            const bookingData = {
                VenueID: currentVenue,
                SessionID: currentSession,
                TicketsAreaID: currentArea,
                PaymentMethodID: "A",
                Count: count,
                TotalAmount: currentPrice * count,
                Seats: []
            };

            try {
                // ?? Demo ½G┬IĪGżH¼░®Ą┐­ 1.2 ¼ĒĪA«i▓{Īu¼yČq½d«pĪv▒ŲČż«─¬G
                await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1200));

                const res = await fetch('/Seats/ConfirmBooking', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify(bookingData)
                });

                const result = await res.json();

                if (result.success) {
                    // ? ”©ź\ĪG¬Į▒ĄŠ╔”VźI┤┌ŁČŁ▒Ī]żŻ├÷│¼┬Ó░ķĪA┼²ŁČŁ▒”█ĄMż┴┤½Ī^
                    window.location.href = '/Seats/Payment/' + result.orderID;
                } else {
                    // ? źó▒čĪG┴¶┬├ź■┐├╣§┬Ó░ķĪA½ņ┤_½÷ČsĪA©├┼Ńź▄┐∙╗~
                    waitingRoom.style.display = 'none';
                    btn.disabled = false;
                    btn.innerHTML = originalHtml;
                    alert("? Łq┴╩źó▒čĪG" + result.message);
                }
            } catch (error) {
                // ?? ▓¦▒`ĪG┴¶┬├ź■┐├╣§┬Ó░ķ
                waitingRoom.style.display = 'none';
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.innerHTML = originalHtml;
                console.error("Booking Error:", error);
                alert("?? ©t▓╬┴c”Ż®╬│sĮu▓¦▒`ĪAĮąĄy½ß”AĖšĪC");
            }
        }
    </script>
}

                </h5>
                <div class="payment-group">
                    @if (ViewData["PaymentMethods"] != null)
                    {
                        var methods = (List<TicketSalesSystem.Models.PaymentMethod>)ViewData["PaymentMethods"];
                        for (int i = 0; i < methods.Count; i++)
                        {
                            @* ?? «┌Š┌”W║┘©M®w╣Žź▄╗P├C”Ō├■¦O *@
                            string iconClass = "bi-shield-lock"; // ╣w│]
                            string colorClass = "text-pixel-blue"; // ╣w│]┬┼”Ō

                            if (methods[i].PaymentMethodID.Contains("A") || methods[i].PaymentMethodName.Contains("┬Ó▒b"))
                            {
                                iconClass = "bi-bank2";
                                colorClass = "text-pixel-blue"; // ATM ░t┬┼”Ō
                            }
                            else if (methods[i].PaymentMethodID.Contains("C") || methods[i].PaymentMethodName.Contains("Card"))
                            {
                                iconClass = "bi-credit-card-2-front";
                                colorClass = "text-pixel-pink"; // ½Hź╬źd░t»╗”Ō
                            }

                            <div class="payment-pixel-box mb-3">
                                <input type="radio" class="btn-check" name="payType"
                                       id="pay_@methods[i].PaymentMethodID"
                                       value="@methods[i].PaymentMethodID"
                                       @(i == 0 ? "checked" : "")>
                                <label class="btn d-flex align-items-center p-3 text-start w-100"
                                       for="pay_@methods[i].PaymentMethodID">

                                    @* ?? │oĖ╠Ę|░╩║Aż┴┤½╣Žź▄╗P├C”Ō *@
                                    <i class="bi @iconClass fs-3 me-3 @colorClass shadow-glow-@(colorClass.Contains("pink") ? "pink" : "blue")"></i>

                                    <div class="flex-grow-1">
                                        <div class="fw-bold text-white">@methods[i].PaymentMethodName</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <span class="check-mark-pixel">SELECTED</span>
                                </label>
                            </div>
                        }
                    }
                </div>

                <div class="mt-5">
                    <div class="form-check mb-4">
                        <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="agreeTerms" checked style="transform: scale(1.5); margin-right: 15px;">
                        <label class="pixel-legal-text ms-2" for="agreeTerms">
                            ¦┌żwŠ\▓”©├”PĘN╝ŲŠ┌ČŪ┐ķ▒°┤┌
                        </label>
                    </div>

                    <button type="button" onclick="confirmPayment()" class="btn-pixel w-100 py-4" style="font-size: 1.6rem;">
                        ĮT╗{źI┤┌
                    </button>

                    <div class="mt-4 text-center">
                        <form asp-controller="UserOrders" asp-action="UserCancelOrder" asp-route-id="@Model.OrderID" method="post" id="cancelForm">
                            <button type="button" id="btnCancel" class="btn-pixel-text text-pixel-pink fs-pixel-small" onclick="confirmCancel()">
                                [ ¦┌Łn©·«°Łq│µ ]
                            </button>
                        </form>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11"></script>
    <script>
        // ?? ▓╬ż@ SweetAlert ŁĘ«µ¼░▓`”Ō
        const PixelSwal = Swal.mixin({
            background: '#000',
            color: '#fff',
            confirmButtonColor: '#ff00cc',
            cancelButtonColor: '#00ccff',
            customClass: {
                popup: 'border-pixel-pink border-4'
            }
        });

        function confirmCancel() {
            PixelSwal.fire({
                title: 'ĮT®wŁn©·«°Łq│µĪH',
                text: "«y”ņ¦Y▒N─└®±!!",
                icon: 'warning',
                showCancelButton: true,
                confirmButtonText: 'ĮT®w©·«°',
                cancelButtonText: '─~─“żõźI',
                allowOutsideClick: false
            }).then((result) => {
                if (result.isConfirmed) {
                    PixelSwal.fire({
                        title: 'ź┐”b▓M▓z╝ŲŠ┌...',
                        html: 'DELETING_ASSET_RESERVATION...',
                        allowOutsideClick: false,
                        didOpen: () => { Swal.showLoading(); }
                    });
                    document.getElementById('cancelForm').submit();
                }
            })
        }

        (function () {
            const timerDisplay = document.getElementById("countdownTimer");
            const expireTimeStr = "@Model.ExpireTimeText";
            const expireTime = new Date(expireTimeStr).getTime();

            const timerFunc = setInterval(function () {
                const now = new Date().getTime();
                const distance = expireTime - now;

                if (distance < 0) {
                    clearInterval(timerFunc);
                    timerDisplay.innerHTML = "00:00";
                    PixelSwal.fire("©t▓╬╣O«╔", "╝ŲŠ┌│sĄ▓żw┐“źóĪAŁq│µźó«─ĪC", "error").then(() => {
                        window.location.href = "/Home/Index";
                    });
                    return;
                }

                const minutes = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
                const seconds = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);

                timerDisplay.innerHTML =
                    (minutes < 10 ? "0" : "") + minutes + ":" +
                    (seconds < 10 ? "0" : "") + seconds;

                // │čŠlż@ż└─┴┼▄”Ō─Ą¦i
                if (minutes < 1) {
                    timerDisplay.style.animation = "dot-blink 0.5s infinite";
                }
            }, 1000);
        })();

        window.confirmPayment = async function() {
            const selectedPayType = document.querySelector('input[name="payType"]:checked');
            if (!selectedPayType) {
                PixelSwal.fire("┐∙╗~", "Įą┐’Š▄ČŪ┐ķ©¾®w (żõźIżĶ”Ī)", "error");
                return;
            }

            const btn = document.querySelector('.btn-pixel');
            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.innerHTML = 'UPLOADING_AUTH...';

            try {
                const res = await fetch('/Seats/Payment', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        OrderID: "@Model.OrderID",
                        PaymentMethodID: selectedPayType.value
                    })
                });

                const result = await res.json();
                if (result.success) {
                    PixelSwal.fire("”©ź\", "? ▒┬┼v”©ź\ĪI╝ŲŠ┌”P©BżżĪC", "success").then(() => {
                        window.location.href = "/UserOrders/UserIndex";
                    });
                } else {
                    PixelSwal.fire("®┌Ą┤", "? ▒┬┼vźó▒čĪG" + result.message, "error");
                    btn.disabled = false;
                    btn.innerHTML = 'Ł½Ęs▒┬┼v (RETRY)';
                }
            } catch (error) {
                PixelSwal.fire("▓¦▒`", "?? ░TĖ╣żż┬_ĪAĮą└╦¼d║¶Ė¶¬¼║AĪC", "error");
                btn.disabled = false;
            }
        };
    </script>
}

<div class="container text-center" style="margin-top: 80px; max-width: 550px;">

    @* --- ?? ▓─ż@Čź¼qĪG┼ń├ęĮX╣hżf (Security Override) --- *@
    <div id="gateSection">
        <div class="pixel-container-box">
            @* ╝ą├D”C *@
            <div class="border-bottom border-secondary pb-3 mb-4">
                <h3 class="text-pixel-yellow fw-bold mb-0">
                    <i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill me-2"></i>[ ”wź■┼ń├ę  ]
                </h3>

            <div class="py-2">
                <p class="text-pixel-muted fs-pixel-small mb-4">

                           style="font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 8px;"
                           placeholder="____" maxlength="4">

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        let captchaCode = "";
        const sessionId = '@Model';

        // 1. ź═”©╣│»└ŁĘ«µ┼ń├ęĮX
        function generateCaptcha() {
            const canvas = document.getElementById('captchaCanvas');
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // ├Ė╗sŁI┤║ŠĖ┬IĪA╝Wź[┴╔│šĘP
            for(let i=0; i<100; i++){
                ctx.fillStyle = i % 2 === 0 ? "rgba(0, 204, 255, 0.1)" : "rgba(255, 0, 204, 0.1)";
                ctx.fillRect(Math.random()*canvas.width, Math.random()*canvas.height, 2, 2);
            }

            ctx.font = "bold 40px 'Courier New', Courier, monospace";
            ctx.fillStyle = "#00ccff"; // pixel-blue
            const chars = "ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789";
            captchaCode = "";
            for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                let char = chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length));
                captchaCode += char;
                ctx.save();
                ctx.translate(45 * i + 35, 45);
                ctx.rotate((Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3);
                // ź[żJ│▒╝v«─¬G
                ctx.shadowColor = "rgba(0, 204, 255, 0.5)";
                ctx.shadowBlur = 10;
                ctx.fillText(char, 0, 0);
                ctx.restore();
            }
        }

        // 2. ┼ń├ę╗P▒ŲČż┼▐┐Ķ
        async function startQueue() {
            const input = document.getElementById('captchaInput').value.toUpperCase();

            if (input !== captchaCode) {
                alert("? ACCESS_DENIED: ┼ń├ęĮX┐∙╗~ĪI");
                generateCaptcha();
                return;
            }

            const btn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.innerHTML = "UPLOADING...";

            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/Seats/VerifyGateCaptcha`, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
                    body: new URLSearchParams({
                        id: sessionId,
                        captchaInput: input,
                        sessionCaptcha: captchaCode
                    })
                });

                const result = await response.json();

                if (!result.success) {
                    alert("? SERVER_REJECTED: " + result.message);
                    btn.disabled = false;
                    btn.innerHTML = "ĮT╗{░eźX (RETRY)";
                    generateCaptcha();
                    return;
                }

                if (result.isQueuing === false) {
                    window.location.href = `/Seats/Index/${sessionId}`;
                } else {
                    document.getElementById('gateSection').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('queueSection').style.display = 'block';
                    startPolling();
                }

            } catch (error) {
                alert("?? CONNECTION_ERROR: ©t▓╬│sĮu▓¦▒`");
                btn.disabled = false;
            }
        }

        function startPolling() {
            const check = setInterval(() => {
                fetch(`/Seats/CheckQueueStatus?id=${sessionId}`)
                    .then(res => res.json())
                    .then(data => {
                        if (data.canEnter) {
                            clearInterval(check);
                            let targetUrl = data.redirectUrl || `/Seats/Index/${sessionId}`;
                            window.location.href = targetUrl;
                        }
                    });
            }, 2500); // ĄyĘL╝Wź[Į³Ė▀ČĪ╣jĪA¦¾”│Īu▒ŲČżĪv¬║ĘP─▒
        }

        generateCaptcha();
    </script>
}

@model int

<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/Admin/Programme/Create/step0.css" asp-append-version="true" />

<div class="container mb-5 mt-4">
    <div class="tech-step-container">
        @* Či½ū®│Įu *@
        <div class="tech-progress-bg"></div>

        @* ?? ░╩║AŁp║ŌČi½ūĪG5 ©BźN¬Ē”│ 4 ŁėČĪ╣jĪA®ęźH©C©B¼O 25% *@
        <div class="tech-progress-fill" style="width: @((Model - 1) * 25)%;"></div>

        @for (int i = 1; i <= 5; i++)
        {
            var isActive = i <= Model;
            var isCurrent = i == Model;

            <div class="step-node @(isActive ? "active" : "") @(isCurrent ? "current" : "")">
                <div class="step-number">
                    @i
                </div>
                <div class="step-label">
                    @GetStepName(i)
                </div>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

@functions {
    string GetStepName(int step)
    {
        return step switch
        {
            1 => "░“ź╗ĖĻ«Ų",
            2 => "│§”Ė│]®w",
            3 => "▓╝░Ž│]®w",
            4 => "╣Žż∙żWČŪ",
            5 => "│╠½ßĮT╗{",
            _ => "UNKNOWN"
        };
    }
}

@* --- [3. │qź╬ AJAX ┼▐┐Ķ] --- *@
<script>
          $(document).ready(function () {

        // --- [Ęs╝W½÷Čs─▓Ąo] ---
        // ░▓│]¦A¬║½÷Čs¼O <button class="quick-add-btn" data-mode="Type">
        $('.quick-add-btn').click(function () {
            const mode = $(this).data('mode'); // Type ®╬ Status
            $('#addModalMode').val(mode);
            $('#addModalTitle').text(mode === 'Type' ? 'Ęs╝W║ž├■' : 'Ęs╝W¬¼║A');

            // ”p¬G¼O Status ╝ę”ĪĪA┼Ńź▄ ID ┐ķżJ«žĪF”p¬G¼O Type ½h┴¶┬├Ī]”█░╩ĮsĖ╣Ī^
            $('#idInputGroup').toggle(mode === 'Status');

            $('#universalAddModal').modal('show');
        });

        // --- [Įs┐Ķ½÷Čs─▓Ąo] ---
        $('.quick-edit-btn').click(function () {
            const mode = $(this).data('mode');
            const selectId = (mode === 'Type') ? '#faqTypeSelect' : '#faqStatusSelect';

            const id = $(selectId).val();
            let text = $(selectId + " option:selected").text();

            if (!id) return alert("Įąź²┐’©·ČĄźžĪI");

            // ”p¬G¼O┼Ńź▄ "ID - Name" «µ”ĪĪA¦┌Ł╠źu©·½ßŁ▒¬║”W║┘
            if (text.includes('-')) text = text.split('-').pop().trim();

            $('#editModalMode').val(mode);
            $('#editIdField').val(id);
            $('#editNameField').val(text);
            $('#editModalTitle').text(mode === 'Type' ? 'Įs┐Ķ║ž├■' : 'Įs┐Ķ¬¼║A');

            $('#universalEditModal').modal('show');
        });

        // --- [│qź╬░§”µĘs╝W AJAX] ---
        $('#universalSaveBtn').click(function () {
            const mode = $('#addModalMode').val();
            const url = (mode === 'Type') ? '@Url.Action("CreateTypeQuickly", "FAQs")' : '@Url.Action("QuickCreateStatus", "FAQs")';
            const data = (mode === 'Type')
                ? { typeName: $('#newNameInput').val() }
                : { id: $('#newIdInput').val(), name: $('#newNameInput').val() };

            $.post(url, data, function (res) {
                if (res.success) {
                    // ”^ČŪ«µ”Ī│B▓zĪGType ź╬ res.faqTypeName, Status ź╬ res.name (ID-Name)
                    const displayId = (mode === 'Type') ? res.faqTypeId : res.id;
                    const displayText = (mode === 'Type') ? res.faqTypeName : res.name;
                    const selectTarget = (mode === 'Type') ? '#faqTypeSelect' : '#faqStatusSelect';

                    $(selectTarget).append(new Option(displayText, displayId)).val(displayId).trigger('change');
                    $('#universalAddModal').modal('hide');
                    $('.order-input').val(''); // ▓M¬┼
                } else { alert(res.message); }
            });
        });

        // --- [│qź╬░§”µ¦¾Ęs AJAX] ---
        $('#universalUpdateBtn').click(function () {
            const mode = $('#editModalMode').val();
            const url = (mode === 'Type') ? '@Url.Action("EditTypeQuickly", "FAQs")' : '@Url.Action("EditStatusQuickly", "FAQs")';
            const id = $('#editIdField').val();
            const name = $('#editNameField').val();

            // ░č╝Ų”WŁnĖ“ Controller ╣’żWĪGType ź╬ typeId/typeName, Status ź╬ id/name
            const data = (mode === 'Type') ? { typeId: id, typeName: name } : { id: id, name: name };

            $.post(url, data, function (res) {
                if (res.success) {
                    const selectTarget = (mode === 'Type') ? '#faqTypeSelect' : '#faqStatusSelect';
                    const displayText = (mode === 'Type') ? res.faqTypeName : res.name;

                    $(selectTarget + " option[value='" + id + "']").text(displayText);
                    $('#universalEditModal').modal('hide');
                }
            });
        });
    });
</script>

@model IEnumerable<TicketSalesSystem.Models.FAQ>

@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "▒`©Ż░▌├D";
    Layout = "_UserLayout";

    // ½O½∙Łņź╗¬║ż└▓š┼▐┐Ķ
    var groupedFaqs = Model.GroupBy(f => f.FAQType.FAQTypeName);
}

<style>
    .font-pixel-small .fs-pixel-small{
                font-size: 0.8rem;
    
    }
    /* ?? ╣│»└żŌŁĘĄ^«ųż▀╝╦”Ī */
    .pixel-accordion {
        background: transparent;
        border: none;
    }

    .pixel-accordion-item {
        background-color: var(--pixel-bg-light) !important;
        border: 2px solid #331144 !important;
        border-radius: 0 !important;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .pixel-accordion-button {
        background-color: #000 !important;
        color: #fff !important;
        font-family: 'Press Start 2P', cursive;
        font-size:1.2rem;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 0 !important;
        box-shadow: none !important;
        border-bottom: 2px solid var(--pixel-blue) !important;
        transition: all 0.2s;
    }

        .pixel-accordion-button:not(.collapsed) {
            color: var(--pixel-yellow) !important;
            border-bottom-color: var(--pixel-pink) !important;
        }

        /* Įb└Y├C”ŌŁūź┐ */
        .pixel-accordion-button::after {
            filter: invert(1) hue-rotate(180deg) brightness(2); /* ┼²Įb└Y┼▄”Ō */
        }

    .pixel-accordion-body {
        background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        color: #fff;
        line-height: 1.8;
        border-top: 2px dashed #331144;
        font-size: 1.2rem !important;
        line-height: 2 !important;

    }

    /* ─a░▒«─¬G */
    .pixel-accordion-button:hover {
        background-color: #111 !important;
        padding-left: 30px; /* ╗┤ĘLźk▓Š╝Wź[░╩║AĘP */
    }
   
</style>

<div class="container py-5">
    @* ?? ŁČŁ▒╝ą├DĪG╝ŲŠ┌żżż▀ŁĘ«µ *@
    <div class="pixel-container-box mb-5">
        <div class="text-center">
            <h2 class="text-pixel-yellow mb-0">@ViewData["Title"] </h2>

        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-lg-10">

            @if (!Model.Any())
            {
                <div class="pixel-container-box text-center py-5">
                    <span class="text-pixel-muted">[ ©t▓╬¦¾Ęsżż... ]</span>
                </div>
            }
            else
            {
                @foreach (var group in groupedFaqs)
                {
                    @* ż└├■╝ą├D *@
                    <h4 class="text-pixel-pink mt-5 mb-3 font-pixel-small">
                        <i class="bi bi-terminal me-2"></i>@group.Key
                    </h4>

                    @* ?? ╣│»└żŲżŌŁĘĄ^«eŠ╣ *@
                    <div class="accordion pixel-accordion" id="accordion_@group.Key.GetHashCode()">
                        @foreach (var faq in group)
                        {
                            <div class="accordion-item pixel-accordion-item">
                                <h2 class="accordion-header" id="heading_@faq.FAQID">
                                    <button class="accordion-button collapsed pixel-accordion-button" type="button"
                                            data-bs-toggle="collapse"
                                            data-bs-target="#collapse_@faq.FAQID">
                                        <span class="text-pixel-blue me-3">Q:</span> @faq.FAQTitle
                                    </button>
                                </h2>
                                <div id="collapse_@faq.FAQID" class="accordion-collapse collapse"
                                     data-bs-parent="#accordion_@group.Key.GetHashCode()">
                                    <div class="accordion-body pixel-accordion-body">
                                        <div class="text-white">
                                            A:@Html.Raw(faq.FAQDescription?.Replace("\n", "<br/>"))
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        }
                    </div>
                }
            }

            @* ?? ®││Ī┐įĖ▀░ŽČ¶ *@

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        $(function() {
            // --- ┬▓░TĄo░e┼▐┐Ķ ---
            $(document).on("click", "#btnSendSMS", function() {
                var $btn = $(this);
                $btn.prop('disabled', true).text("SENDING...");

                $.post("/UserMembers/SendSmsCode", { id: "@Model.MemberID" }, function(res) {
                    if (res.success) {
                        $("#inputVerifyCode").val("");
                        $("#verifyBox").fadeIn(); // ╣│»└ŁĘ½ž─│ź╬ fadeIn ®╬¬Į▒Ą┼Ńź▄
                        startTimer(60, $btn);
                    } else {
                        alert("?? " + res.message);
                        $btn.prop('disabled', false).text("RETRY");
                    }
                });
            });

            // --- Ł╦╝ŲŁp«╔Š╣ ---
            function startTimer(duration, $button) {
                var timer = duration;
                var interval = setInterval(function () {
                    $button.text(timer + "s ");
                    if (--timer < 0) {
                        clearInterval(interval);
                        $button.prop('disabled', false).text("RESEND CODE");
                    }
                }, 1000);
            }

            // --- ┼ń├ęĮX┤Żźµ ---
            $(document).on("click", "#btnSubmitSMS", function() {
                var code = $("#inputVerifyCode").val();
                if (code.length < 6) { alert("ENTER 6 DIGITS!"); return; }

                $.post("/UserMembers/SubmitVerifyCode", { id: "@Model.MemberID", inputCode: code }, function(res) {
                    if (res.success) {
                        alert("?? LEVEL UP! ┼ń├ę”©ź\");
                        location.reload();
                    } else {
                        alert("? ┼ń├ęĮX┐ķżJ┐∙╗~!");
                        $("#inputVerifyCode").val("");
                    }
                });
            });
        });
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    @* ĮąĮT½OŁČŁ▒”│ż▐ź╬ qrcode.js *@
    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            const qrContainers = document.querySelectorAll('.qrcode-container');
            qrContainers.forEach(container => {
                const code = container.getAttribute('data-code');
                if (code) {
                    new QRCode(container, {
                        text: code,
                        width: 160,
                        height: 160,
                        colorDark: "#000000",
                        colorLight: "#ffffff",
                        correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
                    });
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11"></script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
            const collapseElements = document.querySelectorAll('.collapse');
            collapseElements.forEach(el => {
                el.addEventListener('show.bs.collapse', function () {
                    const btn = document.querySelector(`[data-bs-target="#${this.id}"]`);
                    if (btn) btn.querySelector('.btn-text').innerText = '”¼”X';
                });
                el.addEventListener('hide.bs.collapse', function () {
                    const btn = document.querySelector(`[data-bs-target="#${this.id}"]`);
                    if (btn) btn.querySelector('.btn-text').innerText = '└╦Ą°®·▓ė';
                });
            });

            @if (TempData["Success"] != null)
            {
                    <text>
                    Swal.fire({
                        background: '#110022',
                        color: '#00ff66',
                        title: '[ ░§”µ”©ź\ ]',
                        text: '@Html.Raw(TempData["Success"])',
                        confirmButtonColor: '#ff00cc',
                        confirmButtonText: 'żFĖč',
                        customClass: { popup: 'pixel-modal-content' }
                    });
                    </text>
            }
        });
    </script>
}

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11"></script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            const typeSelect = document.getElementById('typeSelect');
            const orderIdReq = document.getElementById('orderIdReq');
            const fileReq = document.getElementById('fileReq');
            const signalForm = document.getElementById('signalForm');

            const PixelAlert = Swal.mixin({
                background: '#000',
                color: '#fff',
                confirmButtonColor: '#ff00cc',
                customClass: { popup: 'border-pixel-pink border-4' }
            });

            // ?? Łū¦’┬IĪG└użŲ½ß¬║│s░╩¦P┬_
            function updateRequiredStatus() {
                const selectedText = typeSelect.options[typeSelect.selectedIndex].text;
                // ®wĖqŁ■©Ū├÷┴õ”r╗▌ŁnĪuź▓Č±Īv
                const requiredKeywords = ["Łq│µ", "źI┤┌", "▓╝©ķ", "░h▓╝"];
                // └╦¼d┐’żż¬║żÕ”r¼O¦_ź]¦t░}”Cżż¬║ź¶”¾ż@Łė├÷┴õ”r
                const isRequired = requiredKeywords.some(keyword => selectedText.includes(keyword));

                if (isRequired) {
                    orderIdReq.classList.remove('d-none');
                    fileReq.classList.remove('d-none');
                } else {
                    orderIdReq.classList.add('d-none');
                    fileReq.classList.add('d-none');
                }
             }

            typeSelect.addEventListener('change', updateRequiredStatus);

            // ░eźX½e└╦¼d
            signalForm.addEventListener('submit', function (e) {
                const selectedText = typeSelect.options[typeSelect.selectedIndex].text;
                const orderId = document.getElementById('orderIdInput').value.trim();
                const file = document.getElementById('fileInput').value;

                if (selectedText.includes("░h▓╝")) {
                    if (!orderId || !file) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        PixelAlert.fire({
                            icon: 'error',
                            title: '╝ŲŠ┌»╩źó',
                            text: '░h▓╝źėĮąź▓ČĘź]¦tĪuŁq│µĮsĖ╣Īv╗PĪuźėĮą«čĪvĪI'
                        });
                    }
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}

            background-color: rgba(0, 204, 255, 0.1);
            color: var(--pixel-yellow) !important;

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    // --- ?? Chart ź■░ņ¼ņ¦▐ŁĘ░tĖm ---
    Chart.defaults.color = '#fff';
    Chart.defaults.font.family = "'Share Tech Mono', monospace";

    const commonScales = {
        x: {
            ticks: { color: 'rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.7)', font: { size: 10 } },
            grid: { color: 'rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.05)' } // ?? Ł░¦C║¶«µĮu½G½ū
        },
        y: {
            ticks: { color: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7)', font: { size: 10 } },
            grid: { color: 'rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.05)' }
        }
    };

    // 1. Bar Chart
    fetch('/Admin/GetAreaSalesData').then(res => res.json()).then(data => {
        new Chart(document.getElementById('salesAreaChart'), {
            type: 'bar',
            data: {
                labels: data.map(d => d.label),
                datasets: [
                    { label: 'żw░Ō', data: data.map(d => d.sold), backgroundColor: '#00f2ff' },
                    { label: '│čŠl', data: data.map(d => d.remaining), backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' }
                ]
            },
            options: { maintainAspectRatio: false, indexAxis: 'y', scales: commonScales }
        });
    });

    // 2. Line Chart
    fetch('/Admin/GetSalesVelocity').then(res => res.json()).then(data => {
        new Chart(document.getElementById('salesVelocityChart'), {
            type: 'line',
            data: {
                labels: data.map(d => d.hour),
                datasets: [{
                    label: '│µČq',
                    data: data.map(d => d.count),
                    borderColor: '#00f2ff',
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.2)',
                    fill: true,
                    tension: 0.4
                }]
            },
            options: { maintainAspectRatio: false, scales: commonScales }
        });
    });

    // 3. Doughnut Chart (ČĻ╗µ╣Ž)
    fetch('/Admin/GetOrderStatusDistribution').then(res => res.json()).then(data => {
        new Chart(document.getElementById('orderStatusChart'), {
            type: 'doughnut',
            data: {
                labels: data.map(d => d.status),
                datasets: [{
                    data: data.map(d => d.count),
                    backgroundColor: ['#00f2ff', '#7000ff', '#ff0055', '#39ff14'],
                    borderColor: '#000b1a',
                    borderWidth: 3
                }]
            },
            options: {
                maintainAspectRatio: false,
                cutout: '75%',
                plugins: { legend: { position: 'right', labels: { color: '#00f2ff' } } }
            }
        });
    });

    // 4. Alerts
    function loadLiveAlerts() {
        fetch('/Admin/GetLiveAlerts').then(res => res.json()).then(data => {
            const container = document.getElementById('alertsContainer');
            container.innerHTML = data.map(alert => `
                        <div class="p-2 border-start border-${alert.level} border-4 mb-2"
                             style="background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); border-color: var(--tech-${alert.level}) !important;">
                            <div class="tech-label text-${alert.level}" style="font-size:0.7rem; color: var(--tech-${alert.level}) !important;">
                                [ ALERT_${alert.level.toUpperCase()} ]
                            </div>
                            <div class="text-white small opacity-75">${alert.message}</div>
                        </div>
                    `).join('');
        });
    }
    loadLiveAlerts();
    setInterval(loadLiveAlerts, 60000);
});
function refreshBackgroundLogs() {
    fetch('/Admin/GetLiveBackgroundLogs')
        .then(response => {
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Network response was not ok');
            return response.json();
        })
        .then(data => {
            // 1. ¦¾Ęsżķ╗xż║«e (╣’└│żp╝g logs)
            const logContainer = document.getElementById('log-container');
            if (logContainer && data.logs) {
                logContainer.innerHTML = data.logs.map(log =>
                    `<div class="mb-1"><span style="color: #0f0; opacity: 0.6;">[LOG]</span> ${log}</div>`
                ).join('');
            }

            // 2. ¦¾Ęs¬¼║AżÕ”r╗P Spinner (╣’└│żp╝g status)
            const statusText = document.getElementById('current-status-text');
            const statusSpinner = document.getElementById('status-spinner');

            if (statusText) statusText.innerText = data.status;

            if (statusSpinner) {
                // ©Žź╬┼▐┐Ķ¦¾▓M┤Ę¬║ż┴┤½żĶ”Ī
                if (data.status === "½▌Š„żż") {
                    statusSpinner.className = "spinner-grow text-secondary mb-2";
                } else {
                    statusSpinner.className = "spinner-grow text-success mb-2 shadow-glow";
                }
            }
        })
        .catch(err => {
            // ?? ĘĒ│sĮuźó▒č«╔Ī]©ę”p”°¬AŠ╣Ł½▒ężżĪ^ĪAĄ╣║▐▓zŁ¹ż@Łė┤Żź▄
            const statusText = document.getElementById('current-status-text');
            if (statusText) statusText.innerHTML = '<span class="text-danger">│sĮużż┬_...</span>';
            console.warn("║╩▒▒¬A░╚╝╚«╔ĄL¬k│sĮu:", err);
        });
}

// ?? │]®w©C 5 ¼Ē©ĻĘsż@”Ė
setInterval(refreshBackgroundLogs, 5000);

// ?? ŁČŁ▒Ė³żJ½ßź▀¦Y░§”µż@”ĖĪAżŻŁnĄź 5 ¼Ēż~źX▓{
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', refreshBackgroundLogs);

    // ?? 1. ”h╣Ž▓ųź[╝╚”s”└ (Description Images Only)
    let accumulatedDescriptionFiles = [];

    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
        // --- A. │µ▒i╣Žż∙ĪG½╩Ł▒╣Ž║╩┼ź ---
        const coverInput = document.getElementById('CoverImageFile');
    if (coverInput) {
        coverInput.addEventListener('change', function () {
            previewSingle(this, 'coverPreviewContainer');
        });
        }

    // --- B. │µ▒i╣Žż∙ĪG«y”ņ╣Ž║╩┼ź ---
    const seatInput = document.getElementById('SeatImageFile');
    if (seatInput) {
        seatInput.addEventListener('change', function () {
            previewSingle(this, 'seatPreviewContainer');
        });
        }

    // --- C. ”h▒i▓ųź[ĪG┤yŁz╣Ž║╩┼ź ---
    const descInput = document.getElementById('DescriptionImageFiles');
    if (descInput) {
        descInput.addEventListener('change', function (e) {
            const newFiles = Array.from(e.target.files);

            newFiles.forEach(file => {
                const isDuplicate = accumulatedDescriptionFiles.some(f => f.name === file.name && f.size === file.size);
                if (!isDuplicate) accumulatedDescriptionFiles.push(file);
            });

            syncFilesToInput(descInput); // Ł½ŁnĪG”P©B”^ input ┼²½ß║▌”¼▒o©ņ
            renderMultiplePreview('descPreviewContainer', descInput);
        });
        }
    });

    /**
     * ?? «ųż▀ź\»ÓĪG│B▓z│µ▒i╣Žż∙╣w─² (½╩Ł▒ĪB«y”ņ╣Ž)
     */
    function previewSingle(input, containerId) {
        const container = document.getElementById(containerId);
    if (!container) return;

    if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
            const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function (e) {
        // ©Žź╬ img-preview-tech ╝╦”ĪĮT½OĄ°─▒▓╬ż@
        container.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="img-preview-tech d-inline-block animate__animated animate__fadeIn">
                        <img src="${e.target.result}" style="max-height: 200px; max-width: 100%;" />
                        <div class="small text-info mt-1" style="font-size: 0.6rem;">[ SELECTED: ${input.files[0].name} ]</div>
                    </div>`;
            };
    reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
        }
    }

    /**
     * ?? «ųż▀ź\»ÓĪG┤Ķ¼V”h╣Ž▓ųź[╣w─²
     */
    function renderMultiplePreview(containerId, inputElement) {
        const container = document.getElementById(containerId);
    if (!container) return;

    container.innerHTML = ""; // ź²▓M¬┼ĪAŁ½Ęs©╠Š┌╝╚”s”└├Ė╗s

        accumulatedDescriptionFiles.forEach((file, index) => {
            const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function (e) {
                const div = document.createElement("div");
    div.className = "col-md-3 mb-3 animate__animated animate__zoomIn";
    div.innerHTML = `
    <div class="img-preview-tech position-relative">
        <div class="btn-remove-img" onclick="removeFile(${index}, '${containerId}', '${inputElement.id}')">Īč</div>

        <img src="${e.target.result}" class="w-100" style="height: 120px; object-fit: cover;" />

        <div class="small text-truncate mt-1 text-info" style="font-size: 0.65rem;">
            [ DATA: ${file.name} ]
        </div>
    </div>`;
    container.appendChild(div);
            };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
        });
    }

    /**
     * ?? «ųż▀ź\»ÓĪG▒q╝╚”s”└▓Š░Ż╣Žż∙
     */
    window.removeFile = function(index, containerId, inputId) {
        accumulatedDescriptionFiles.splice(index, 1);
    const inputElement = document.getElementById(inputId);
    syncFilesToInput(inputElement);
    renderMultiplePreview(containerId, inputElement);
    };

    /**
     * ?? «ųż▀¦▐│NĪG▒N JS ░}”C╝gżJ Input ¬½ź¾
     */
    function syncFilesToInput(inputElement) {
        const dataTransfer = new DataTransfer();
        accumulatedDescriptionFiles.forEach(file => dataTransfer.items.add(file));
    inputElement.files = dataTransfer.files;
    }
